heroes.name: ADAM WARLOCK
heroes.desc: The genetically-engineered Adam Warlock wields mighty Quantum Magic, allowing him to connect and heal souls with a gentle touch. When the time comes for his allies to unite, Warlock emerges as the unwavering epicenter of cosmic justice!

abilities.name: Quantum Magic
abilities.desc: Launch quantum energy to deal damage

abilities.name: Karmic Revival
abilities.desc: Take to the skies, entering a flying state and swiftly surge forward

abilities.name: Karmic Revival
abilities.desc: Awaken the karma of allies to revive them. Allies revived have lower health but enjoy a brief period of Invincibility

abilities.name: Soul Bond
abilities.desc: Forge a soul bond with allies, granting Healing Over Time and distributing damage taken across the bond

abilities.name: Avatar Life Stream
abilities.desc: Target an ally for a bouncing stream of healing energy, which also heals himself upon casting; self-targets if no ally is selected
abilities.cd_text: 2 charges, with each charge taking 6s to recharge; when a critical hit lands on an enemy, reduce the cooldown time of Avatar Life Stream by 1s.

abilities.name: Cosmic Cluster
abilities.desc: Gather quantum energy into a cluster and then swiftly launch it at the enemy

abilities.name: Regenerative Cocoon
abilities.desc: Once his body perishes, Adam Warlock can freely move as a soul and reforge his body at a chosen spot

teamups.name: COSMIC CYCLONE
teamups.base: Teammates linked by Soul Bond receive a Speed Boost.
teamups.enhanced: When teaming up with Storm, linked teammates additionally gain a Damage Boost.

teamups.name: FLAWLESS DESIGN
teamups.base: Cosmic Cluster now provides healing to allies.
teamups.enhanced: When teaming up with Ultron, Cosmic Cluster creates an explosion upon impact.

received.name: HEAVENLY HARMONY
received.desc: Storm channels her elemental power into Adam Warlock. When Adam uses Soaring Surge, his movement speed is increased. While flying, Adam leaves behind a storm-charged trail that heals and speeds up allies within it

heroes.name: ANGELA
heroes.desc: As the Hand of Heven, the warrior called Angela embodies unwavering courage and determination. Able to manipulate Ichors into various weapons and unfurl her wings to soar across the battlefield, she is ready to deliver divine judgment upon her foes!

abilities.name: Spear of Ichors
abilities.desc: Lunge forward with your spear, dealing damage that increases with Attack Charge. At full charge, Spear of Ichor can launch up enemies

abilities.name: Axes Of Ichors
abilities.desc: Alternate powerful strikes forward with twin axes, dealing increased damage as Attack Charge grows. The fourth strike propels you forward in a swift dash
abilities.dmg: First three strikes: 30; the forth strike: 50.

abilities.name: SHIELDED STANCE
abilities.desc: Transform Ichors into a shield, gaining Attack Charge when absorbing damage

abilities.name: Seraphic Soar
abilities.desc: Glide freely through the air. Continuous flight builds Attack Charge

abilities.name: Divine Judgement
abilities.desc: Dive downward, switch to twin axes and infuse the ground with Ichors to create a Divine Judgement Zone upon impact. Within the zone, gain enhanced Speed and attacks grant Bonus Health to self and nearby allies

abilities.name: Wingblade Ascent
abilities.desc: Take to the skies, switching back to Spear of Ichors

abilities.name: Assassin's Charge
abilities.desc: Enter an accelerated dash state, enemies struck head-on are carried through the air for a short distance

abilities.name: Heven's Retribution
abilities.desc: Wrap your spear in ribbons and hurl it with force. Upon impact, the ribbons bind nearby enemies. Angela can leap to the spear's location, damaging surrounding enemies and creating a Divine Judgement Zone

teamups.name: ASGARDIANS OF THE GALAXY
teamups.base: Activation grants Reveal within a targeted area. Activating the ability again performs a slam attack; enemies hit by the slam are Grounded.
teamups.enhanced: When teaming up with Star-Lord, Angela gains Bonus Health scaling with the number of enemies struck by the slam.

teamups.name: ODIN'S UNACKNOWLEDGED
teamups.base: Project an Illusion forward. The illusion utilizes Assassin's Charge to thrust at enemies. Enemies struck head-on will be carried through the air for a short while.
teamups.enhanced: When teaming up with Loki, the ability gains two charges.

received.name: Celestial Command
received.desc: Angela shares fragments of her Ichors with Thor, empowering him to hurl a Thunder Spear that restores Thorforce for each enemy struck. Afterward, Thor can leap to the spear's explosion point, dealing a second wave of damage to all enemies within range

heroes.name: BLACK CAT
heroes.desc: One of the world's premiere thieves, Felicia Hardy glides across the battlefield with swift precision and a dancer's grace, ever ready to purloin an opponent's fortune. Those who meet the Black Cat's gaze should beware, as her omens never miss their mark!

abilities.name: FELINE FURY
abilities.desc: Swipe forward with razor-sharp claws

abilities.name: CALLING CARD
abilities.desc: Issue a Calling Card to all enemies. Instantly dash to any enemy in sight and range, tearing into them with your claws to deal Percentage Damage

abilities.name: CAT'S CRADLE
abilities.desc: Lunge forward with claws bared, slicing through any enemies caught in your path
abilities.cd_text: 1 charges, with each charge taking 8s to recharge

abilities.name: TURN OF FORTUNE
abilities.desc: Launch a grappling hook forward that damages an enemy on impact and steals Fortunebefore pulling it back to Black Cat

abilities.name: THIEVING GRACE
abilities.desc: Perform a double jump

abilities.name: FORTUNE'S FAVOR
abilities.desc: Spend Fortuneto unleash either Grapple Swipeor Phantom Pursuit

abilities.name: STEALTHY CATWALK
abilities.desc: Hold {Jump} to crawl up vertical surfaces

abilities.name: MALKIN MISFORTUNE
abilities.desc: Apply Jinxto enemies on hit. Jinxedfoes have a chance to lose their bonus damage when striking Black Cat with a Critical Hit

abilities.name: CLAW WHIP
abilities.desc: Fire out tethered claws and whip them forward in a devastating arc, dealing damage to all enemies caught in range

abilities.name: CALLING CARD
abilities.desc: Issue a Calling Card to all enemies. Instantly dash to any enemy in sight and range, tearing into them with your claws to deal Percentage Damage

abilities.name: CAT'S CRADLE
abilities.desc: Lunge forward with claws bared, slicing through any enemies caught in your path
abilities.cd_text: 1 charges, with each charge taking 8s to recharge

abilities.name: PHANTOM PURSUIT
abilities.desc: Swiftly dash to an enemy, unleash a rapid flurry of claw attacks, and flash back to your starting position. Black Cat is Untargetableduring this move

abilities.name: THIEVING GRACE
abilities.desc: Perform a double jump

abilities.name: FORTUNE'S FAVOR
abilities.desc: Spend Fortuneto unleash either Grapple Swipeor Phantom Pursuit

abilities.name: STEALTHY CATWALK
abilities.desc: Hold {Jump} to crawl up vertical surfaces

abilities.name: MALKIN MISFORTUNE
abilities.desc: Apply Jinxto enemies on hit. Jinxedfoes have a chance to lose their bonus damage when striking Black Cat with a Critical Hit

abilities.name: GILDED DEAL
abilities.desc: Use the Spatial Resonator to open a portal to the Elder Gods' dimension, consuming Fortune to trade with the Golden Elder and acquire items from the New York Thieves Guild vault.

abilities.name: TABLET OF DESTINIES
abilities.desc: Gain a random amount of Fortune

abilities.name: HELM OF HADES
abilities.desc: Enter Invisiblestate for a set duration

abilities.name: FALTINE FLAME ORB
abilities.desc: Conjure an orb of mystical Faltine Flame to Revealand mark all nearby enemies

abilities.name: CHERNOBOG'S CRYSTAL
abilities.desc: Purify yourself, instantly removing any active control effects

abilities.name: RING OF ZONA
abilities.desc: Open a portal on a surface, allowing instant traversal to the opposite side

abilities.name: MENTO-FISH
abilities.desc: Create a hypnosis field. Inflicts Slow, disables movement abilities, and Groundsall enemies caught within

abilities.name: STICKY PAWS
abilities.desc: Steal a set amount of Fortunewhenever your attacks hit an enemy

teamups.name: FELINE ALLIANCE
teamups.base: Taking damage accumulates Vibranium Energy. Upon reaching a specific threshold, Black Cat can unleash a violent explosion, damaging and Knocking back surrounding enemies while gaining a brief Speed Boost and Bonus Health.
teamups.enhanced: When teaming up with Black Panther, this explosion is no longer restricted by the energy threshold and can be triggered at any time.

teamups.name: BINDING TIES
teamups.base: Turn of Fortune is replaced by Spider-Web Grapple, which has 2 charges. Landing the grapple on an enemy steals Fortune and applies a Spider-Tracer. If Black Cat hits an enemy carrying a Spider-Tracer with any other ability, she triggers the mark to deal bonus damage.
teamups.enhanced: When teaming up with Spider-Man, using Spider-Web Grapple to hit an enemy already marked with a Spider-Tracer temporarily Immobilizes them in place.

received.name: GIFT OF GOLD
received.desc: Black Cat shares items acquired from Insider Trading with White Fox and Captain America. White Fox receives the Life Orb, which restores Spirit Fox Tail energy and converts life energy into Nine-Tailed Radiance that auto-tracks nearby allies and enemies, granting allies speed and healing while dealing damage and slowing enemies. Captain America receives the Vibranium Energy Amplifier, which expands shield block range when raised and reflects projectiles back along the crosshair direction.

received.name: GIFT OF GOLD
received.desc: Black Cat shares items acquired from Insider Trading with White Fox and Captain America. White Fox receives the Life Orb, which restores Spirit Fox Tail energy and converts life energy into Nine-Tailed Radiance that auto-tracks nearby allies and enemies, granting allies speed and healing while dealing damage and slowing enemies. Captain America receives the Vibranium Energy Amplifier, which expands shield block range when raised and reflects projectiles back along the crosshair direction.

heroes.name: BLACK PANTHER
heroes.desc: T'Challa, King of Wakanda, wields the perfect blend of the cutting-edge Vibranium technology and ancestral power drawn from the Panther God, Bast. The Black Panther bides his time until elegantly infiltrating enemy lines and commencing his hunt.

abilities.name: Vibranium Claws
abilities.desc: Slice Vibranium Claws forward

abilities.name: Bast's Descent
abilities.desc: Summon Bast, pouncing forward, dealing damage, and attaching a Vibranium Mark to enemies hit while refreshing Spirit Rend

abilities.name: Spirit Rend
abilities.desc: Lunge forward and deal damage to enemies. Vibranium Mark produces Bonus Health and refreshes the ability

abilities.name: Spinning Kick
abilities.desc: Spiral forward and attach a Vibranium Mark to enemies hit

abilities.name: Subtle Step
abilities.desc: Hold Space to run on a wall; perform a jump after detaching from the wall

abilities.name: Spear Toss
abilities.desc: Toss a Vibranium energy spear forward, creating a Vibranium Force Field and attaching a Vibranium Mark to enemies in its radius

abilities.name: Panther's Cunning
abilities.desc: Deal higher damage when at low Health

teamups.name: DAMISA-YAO
teamups.base: Triggers the elemental power within his armor, dealing damage and applying Slow to surrounding enemies while attaching Vibranium Marks.
teamups.enhanced: When teaming up with Storm, enemies within range are launched toward Black Panther.

teamups.name: DIMENSIONAL SHORTCUT
teamups.base: Activate a Limbo stepping disc to instantly return to your position from a few seconds ago, gaining Bonus Health in the process. When the teleport ends, the disc collapses in an explosion, damaging nearby enemies and applying Vibranium Marks.
teamups.enhanced: When teaming up with Magik, the teleportation sequence can be manually canceled mid-transit.

received.name: GAMMA VIBRANIUM ARMOR
received.desc: Hulk charges Namor and Black Panther with gamma radiation. Namor can summon an extra Gamma Monstro which will continuously fire gamma rays at locked-on enemies. The longer the rays hit, the higher the damage. Black Panther's Vibranium armor is enhanced; when his health is low he receives a gamma shield, blocking incoming attacks and becoming Unstoppable

heroes.name: BLACK WIDOW
heroes.desc: Natasha Romanova is the world's most elite spy in any era. Her mastery of the sniper rifle eliminates targets from afar, while her shock batons neutralize close-range threats. Black Widow is locked, loaded, and ready to deliver a fatal bite!

abilities.name: Widow's Bite Baton
abilities.desc: Strike with the enhanced electric batons

abilities.name: Red Room Rifle
abilities.desc: Attack with the Red Room Rifle

abilities.name: ASSASSIN'S FOCUS
abilities.desc: Switch the Red Room Rifle to sniper mode. Shots fired in this state pierce through targets and deal increased damage

abilities.name: ELECTRO-PLASMA BLAST
abilities.desc: Fire an electro-plasma round forward. Upon hitting the environment or an enemy, it explodes and applies a Slow effect

abilities.name: EDGE DANCER
abilities.desc: Unleash a spinning kick to Launch Up enemies. Landing the hit will allow her to zip to the target with a grappling hook for a second kick

abilities.name: WIDOW'S BITE SLAM
abilities.desc: Leap toward a target area and slam the ground with her Widow's Bite gauntlet, dealing damage to enemies within range

teamups.name: ALLIED AGENTS
teamups.base: Landing hits with Red Room Rifle builds Focus. At three stacks, enter a Focused state where the next bullet gains the Hunter's Sight effect, granting Damage Boost and pierce effects.
teamups.enhanced: When teaming up with Hawkeye, landing a critical hit prevents the Focused state from expiring, allowing continuous enhanced fire until missing a crit.

teamups.name: BURNING BULLETS
teamups.base: Activation grants the Red Room Rifle a Fire Rate Boost. Additionally, the Plasma Cannon projectile becomes a hitscan laser that no longer requires charging.
teamups.enhanced: When teaming up with Phoenix, her Plasma Cannon gains a second ability charge.

heroes.name: BLADE
heroes.desc: Half-human and half-vampire, Eric Brooks walks betweenworlds, craving the very life force of his enemies. As nightfalls, Blade's hunt begins as he wields the Sword of Draculato become the nightmare of any foe who dares to bare theirfangs.

abilities.name: Ancestral Sword
abilities.desc: Slash forward with Blade's Ancestral Sword
abilities.dmg: Cause 26 damage per single slash; double strike cause 13 damage per hit

abilities.name: Hunter's Shotgun
abilities.desc: Fire at enemies using your Shotgun

abilities.name: Scarlet Shroud
abilities.desc: Parry with Ancestral Sword to become Unstoppable for a brief period, reducing damage taken from the front and decreasing the cooldown of Daywalker Dash

abilities.name: Bloodline Awakening
abilities.desc: Awaken the Dhampir bloodline, enhancing slash speed during continuous attacks and triggering Whirlwind Slash.If all Whirlwind Slash strikes hit, your Attack Speed will further increase. While under this state, you suffer Reduced Healing, but attacks gain Lifesteal

abilities.name: Daywalker Dash
abilities.desc: Dash forward. If wielding your gun, shoot at enemies upon impact, applying a Healing Reduction effect. If wielding your sword, deliver a cleaving strike that inflicts Slow
abilities.heal: apply 8% Healing Reduction per strike (32% total if all hit)

abilities.name: Thousand-Fold Slash
abilities.desc: Charge power and swiftly draw the Sword of Dracula, executing a powerful Iaido strike as you dash forward, leaving behind a slashing zone where the sword automatically strikes enemies. Enemies hit suffer Reduced Healing

teamups.name: BLADE OF KHONSHU
teamups.base: Perform a heavy forward cleave with the Ancestral Sword while performing a short dash. At the end of the dash, swiftly slash four times, each strike sending a Darkmoon Blade forward. When a Darkmoon Blade hits an enemy, it bounces to nearby targets.
teamups.enhanced: When teaming up with Moon Knight, each Whirlwind Slash triggered generates one additional Darkmoon Blade.

teamups.name: BLEED FOR BATTLE
teamups.base: For every set amount of damage taken, Blade builds a stack of Bloodline Awakening.
teamups.enhanced: When teaming up with Captain America, taking critical damage instantly triggers the Bloodline Awakening state, gaining bonus stacks while raising the overall stack cap.

received.name: ECLIPSE EDGE
received.desc: Blessed by Khonshu, Blade gains a new ability. When activated, Blade swings his Ancestral Sword in a powerful slash, dashing forward a short distance. At the end of the dash, he swiftly slashes four times, each strike sending a Darkmoon Blade forward. When a Darkmoon Blade hits an enemy, it bounces to nearby targets

heroes.name: CAPTAIN AMERICA
heroes.desc: Enhanced by the Super-Soldier Serum, Steven "Steve" Rogers uses his Vibranium shield and extensive combat training to confront any threat to justice. When Captain America rallies his troops, a wave of courage sweeps across the battlefield!

abilities.name: Sentinel Strike
abilities.desc: Get up close to strike enemies. Landing the second hit enables a shield throw that can ricochet four times
abilities.dmg: Melee Attack Damage: 45, Flying Shield Damage: 45

abilities.name: Freedom Charge
abilities.desc: Shield held high, carve a path forward, granting both himself and allies along the path continuous Bonus Health and Movement Boosts. Allies also gain Ultimate Ability Charge Acceleration. Using Living Legend and Leading Dash while this ability is active can Launch Up enemies
abilities.heal: Cast to gain 150 Bonus Health and grant allies 100 Bonus Health. Every second afterward, gain 100 Bonus Health and grant allies 60 Bonus Health

abilities.name: Leading Dash
abilities.desc: Boost speed and enable Fearless Leap to leap into the air

abilities.name: Vibranium Energy Saw
abilities.desc: Hurl the energy-charged shield to strike enemies in a path
abilities.dmg: Start at 70, with a 20% reduction for each ricochet

abilities.name: Liberty Rush
abilities.desc: Raise the shield and charge forward

abilities.name: Super-Soldier Slam
abilities.desc: Slam down from the sky onto the targeted area, Launching Up enemies

abilities.name: Living Legend
abilities.desc: Raise the shield to deflect incoming projectiles, sending them ricocheting in random directions

teamups.name: STARS ALIGNED
teamups.base: Captain America can leap directly to a teammate, providing Bonus Health to both himself and the ally, while redirecting a portion of their incoming damage to himself.
teamups.enhanced: When teaming up with Winter Soldier, the duo can trigger a mutual rally. Upon confirmation, they charge at one another, slamming together to grant Bonus Health and Movement Speed to all nearby friends. The original effect remains, now additionally granting a Speed Boost to the targeted teammate.

teamups.name: VOLTAIC UNION
teamups.base: Modifies Sentinel Strike into a Lightning Shield projectile. After landing two hits, Captain America launches the piercing Lightning Shield four times.
teamups.enhanced: When teaming up with Thor, the lightning energy imbued in the shield intensifies. Each hit from the Lightning Shield triggers an extra burst of damage in the surrounding area.

received.name: Captain's Spirit
received.desc: Inspired by Captain America's resolve, Winter Soldier can leap to the aid of a designated ally, slamming the ground with his mechanical arm to deal damage to nearby foes. Additionally, Captain America and Winter Soldier can interact with each other once both parties confirm. The duo collides and unleashes a shockwave that deals damage and inflicts slow on enemies

received.name: VIBRANIUM BASTION
received.desc: Black Cat shares her luck with her allies. When White Fox embraces her newfound fortune, she unleashestracking Spirit Tails to grant Healing and Speed to allies, while damaging and Slowing foes. When Captain America enjoys his luck, his shield's block radius expands and allows him to aim deflectedProjectiles directly toward his target

heroes.name: CLOAK&DAGGER
heroes.desc: Tyrone Johnson and Tandy Bowen are nearly inseparable, like two sides of the same coin. Intertwined by forces of shadow and light, Cloak & Dagger fight as a united front, dealing havoc and healing allies across the arena.

abilities.name: Darkforce Cloak
abilities.desc: Inflict continuous damage on an enemy

abilities.name: Eternal Bond
abilities.desc: Perform four rapid dashes, healing allies and damaging enemies along the path

abilities.name: Light's Embrace
abilities.desc: Switch to Dagger

abilities.name: Terror Cape
abilities.desc: Deploy a Veil of Darkforce to damage enemies upon touch, applying Blind to narrow their sight and Vulnerability to amplify damage received

abilities.name: Dark Teleportation
abilities.desc: Enshroud nearby allies in the Darkforce Dimension, plunging them into the Phased state, making them untargetable and invisible to enemies and granting them a Movement Boost
abilities.cd_text: Veil of Lightforce & Terror Cape share charges, capped out at 2 with each taking 10s to recharge. After using either, both abilities enter a 2s cooldown

abilities.name: Lightforce Dagger
abilities.desc: Unleash a bouncing Lightforce Dagger to damage enemies and heal nearby allies

abilities.name: Eternal Bond
abilities.desc: Perform four rapid dashes, healing allies and damaging enemies along the path

abilities.name: Shadow's Embrace
abilities.desc: Switch to Cloak

abilities.name: Veil of Lightforce
abilities.desc: Deploy a Veil of Lightforce to heal allies upon touch and grant them a Healing Boost

abilities.name: Dagger Storm
abilities.desc: Launch a volley of daggers, creating a Healing Over Time field in the impact area
abilities.cd_text: Veil of Lightforce & Terror Cape share charges, capped out at 2 with each taking 10s to recharge. After using either, both abilities enter a 2s cooldown

teamups.name: OBLIVION SHROUD
teamups.base: Veil of Lightforce and Terror Cape are warped by hellfire energy, changing into Veil of Light and Veil of Darkness while retaining their original effects. After traveling a set distance, the veils halt in place. Enemy damage passing through the Veil of Light is weakened, while enemy healing passing through the Veil of Darkness suffers Healing Reduction.
teamups.enhanced: When teaming up with The Hood, the width of both the Veil of Light and Veil of Darkness expands. Additionally, allies passing through the veils are empowered by hellfire energy, gaining Damage Boost for a duration.

teamups.name: FROZEN HAVEN
teamups.base: Channel frost energy outward to encase yourself in an absolute block of ice. This offers great protection, but Freezes you in place. While frozen, you can be healed and emit a weak healing aura to nearby allies.
teamups.enhanced: When teaming up with Luna Snow, the healing aura provided to allies while Frozen becomes significantly stronger.

received.name: FROM SHADOW TO LIGHT
received.desc: Cloak & Dagger inject light and dark energy into Hawkeye's katana. When Hawkeye uses Crescent Slash, enemies hit are launched back, and a blade wave filled with light and energy sweeps forward. This wave passes through both allies and enemies: it heals and boosts healing for allies, while damaging enemies and applying Vulnerability

heroes.name: CYCLOPS
heroes.desc: Scott Summers leads the X-Men as Cyclops. Through his specialized ruby quartz visor, he precisely controls the devastating force channeled through eyes, neutralizing any threat on the battlefield. But when that visor comes off, all restraint disappears, erupting into an unstoppable torrent of concussive energy!

abilities.name: Optic Blast
abilities.desc: Fire a quick burst of kinetic force forward. Hitting enemies accelerates Ricochet Force charge rate

abilities.name: Concussive Beam
abilities.desc: Continuously fire a powerful beam that can refract between enemies and the environment. Hitting enemies accelerates Ricochet Force charge rate

abilities.name: Ricochet Force
abilities.desc: Fire a beam that can diffract and track nearby enemies after hitting terrain. Upon use, Cyclops gains Bonus Health
abilities.cd_text: 2 charges, with each charge taking 15s to recharge. Base Cooldown 2s

abilities.name: Propulsion Burst
abilities.desc: Fire a propulsion beam to push yourself and the target backward, applying a Slow effect to the enemy

abilities.name: Optic Ascent
abilities.desc: Fire a propulsion beam directly downward to push yourself up and knock back hit enemies, applying a Slow effect to them

abilities.name: Kinetic Hover
abilities.desc: Enter a slow-fall state while firing Concussive Beam mid-air

abilities.name: Ruby Rage
abilities.desc: Remove visor and fire a powerful sweeping beam forward. The blast leaves behind volatile excess energy that erupts, dealing massive secondary explosive damage

teamups.name: SLIM AND RED
teamups.base: Hitting an enemy with Ricochet Force summons the Phoenix Force to ignite them, causing continuous burn damage over a set duration. Hitting an ignited target with Optic Blast or Concussive Beam instantly triggers a percentage of the remaining burn damage as a single burst.
teamups.enhanced: When teaming up with Phoenix, Spark detonations reduce the cooldown of Ricochet Force.

teamups.name: KINETIC KIN
teamups.base: Release stored kinetic energy to enter an enhanced state for a duration. While active, Cyclops gains significantly increased movement speed and jump height.
teamups.enhanced: When teaming up with Gambit, during the enhanced state, the attack speeds for both Optic Blast and Concussive Beam are increased.

received.name: Red Adamantium
received.desc: Cyclops supercharges Wolverine's claws, extending his attack range. While active, Wolverine's Vicious Rampage is replaced with Kinetic Claws, granting him a brief forward lunge that unleashes a flurry of slashes around him

heroes.name: DAREDEVIL
heroes.desc: A tragic accident transformed Matt Murdock, blinding him, but awakening his incredible Radar Sense. When darkness falls, Daredevil wields his billy clubs in place of a gavel, doling out justice and purging the world of evil!

abilities.name: JUSTICE JAB
abilities.desc: Swing Billy Clubs forward. Gain Fury on hit

abilities.name: RIGHTEOUS CROSS
abilities.desc: Cross your Billy Clubs and surge forward. Gain Fury on hit

abilities.name: OBJECTION!
abilities.desc: Whirl billy clubs in a tight guard to block frontal damage and reflect projectiles, becoming immune to all incoming harm during this stance and gain Fury

abilities.name: DEVIL'S LATCH
abilities.desc: Fire a grappling line that reels Daredevil and his target toward each other. On completion, gain Fury and temporarily enables Cross Interrogation

abilities.name: INFERNAL FURY
abilities.desc: Expend Fury to unleash Devil's Chain or Devil's Throw. Devil's Chain converts damage into Bonus Health, while Devil's Throw Slows enemies on hit and temporarily enables Cross Interrogation
abilities.dmg: 40. Cause 65 damage when the target caught in the high damage range

abilities.name: Sonic Pursuit
abilities.desc: Locks onto a target, gaining increased Speed; and Damage Reduction when attacked. While in range, dash to the target, Blinding them and restore Fury

abilities.name: RADAR SENSE
abilities.desc: Detect enemy movements within a set radius

abilities.name: BLIND ASCENT
abilities.desc: Run along walls and spring off them to reposition

abilities.name: LET THE DEVIL OUT
abilities.desc: Embrace the Beast within. Enemies in Daredevil's line of sight take damage and suffer a ramping Blind effect. Continually gain Fury while active
abilities.dmg: 50/s. Cause 85 damage per second when reaching the max damage

teamups.name: COMPREHENSIVE DEFENSE
teamups.base: Objection! is enhanced. Whirling billy clubs now damage all enemies in range while deflecting Projectiles from all directions. Successfully deflecting attacks recovers Fury.
teamups.enhanced: When teaming up with Iron Fist, Daredevil passively recovers Health for the entire duration of the ability.

teamups.name: DEVILISH AFFAIR
teamups.base: Swings Devil's Chain in a criss-cross pattern, dealing damage to enemies in front and inflicting a Slow.
teamups.enhanced: When teaming up with Black Widow, the damage radius is expanded, and landing hits recovers Fury.

received.name: BLIND VERDICT
received.desc: Daredevil shares the location of his Sonic Pursuit target with The Punisher. At the same time, The Punisher can launch a devil-infused shock grenade to damage and blind enemies

heroes.name: DEADPOOL
heroes.desc: Wade Wilson is the full package (or so he claims), with devastating damage output, an impenetrable shield, and swift healing. There's no limit to what Deadpool can achieve, as long as he keeps his moves flashy! And, of course, every epic attack comes with an endless barrage of witty banter!

abilities.name: DUAL DESERT EAGLES - VANGUARD
abilities.desc: Nobody lays a finger on my teammates! Anyone tries, and I'm firing these big boy bullets straight at their face!

abilities.name: THE BAN HAMMER
abilities.desc: You! Yeah, you - the hyper one! Eyes off my friends. I sentence you to...whatever! Get ready to be taunted. I get bonus HP and healing, and if you whiff your abilities, you take damage, and I get even more HP!

abilities.name: MAGICAL UNICORN SHIELD!
abilities.desc: Plushie power! It stops every single attack those chumps throw, giving my team a safety bubble. It's cute AND bulletproof

abilities.name: BUNNY BOUNCE
abilities.desc: Yup, I can double jump in midair! During The Big Test and its upgrade, I can also stomp heads and wall jump to reset its cooldown. Stomp enemies so hard they won't get near my team!

abilities.name: HEALING FACTOR
abilities.desc: Out of combat? I'm healing up, staying battle-ready to protect my team. And if I'm about to croak? Surprise! I get a free pass, and my health zooms back up. Nice try, villains

abilities.name: MAXIMUM FLAIR
abilities.desc: Listen up, eyes on the prize, don't wander off! Every time my abilities land on a bad guy, the style points shoot up a notch! When it's full, I can pop my ultimate! With me on the team, you're all staying alive and fabulous!

abilities.name: UPGRADE!
abilities.desc: I'm here to smack baddies, get XP, and shield my friends! When my XP is full, I get to upgrade an ability! Bonus: Score the final hit and force your foe into a selfie—more XP for me! I'm invincible while striking my best duckface. No photobombs!

abilities.name: DEADPOOL IN YOUR AREA - VANGUARD
abilities.desc: Want to hurt my team? Good luck! I hit you with a taunt, mess up your vision, and burn your health nonstop! Best part: my swords and guns go full turbo for the duration. Blink and you'll miss it

abilities.name: KICK@$$ KATANA - VANGUARD
abilities.desc: Protecting my team means my katanas go full savage. No mercy for the baddies!

abilities.name: THE BIG TEST
abilities.desc: Wake the #!&% up, hero! We've got a game to win! Speed and healing buffs for starters, bonus Hazardous Hijinks for me, and extra HP for me and my nearby friends. Hit enough baddies with the right abilities exactly as I ask, and you unlock mega speed and healing, plus reset my Healing Factor cooldown!. Team protection mode: activated!
abilities.dur: The challenge lasts 12s. The buff lasts 6s after you complete it.

abilities.name: HAZARDOUS HIJINKS - VANGUARD

abilities.name: DUAL DESERT EAGLES - VANGUARD UPGRADED
abilities.desc: I rack up shots, then, BOOM! A mind-blowing bubble bomb for all the enemies. Teammate security: maximum

abilities.name: KICK@$$ KATANA - VANGUARD UPGRADED
abilities.desc: Relax, you've got Deadpool on your side! Swords out, baddies out. My stab hits crit, and a Bad Bunny hit makes the next swing a stabby special

abilities.name: DEADPOOL IN YOUR AREA - VANGUARD UPGRADED
abilities.desc: Teammates, stay safe! Dummies, look here! It's showtime: I taunt, blind you, and hit warp speed with my swords and guns. Plus, my crew gets a damage reduction buff, so they're basically invincible. Dummies that stick around too long will even have their UI taped over!

abilities.name: HAZARDOUS HIJINKS - VANGUARD UPGRADED
abilities.desc: Watch this pro bodyguard in action! I dash forward, nail the bad guy, and bounce in any direction I want. Oh, and I can do this two more times real quick!
abilities.cd_text: 2 charges, with each charge taking 10s to recharge.

abilities.name: MAGICAL UNICORN SHIELD! - UPGRADED
abilities.desc: My ultra-cool, super shiny, extra huggable, and totally blinged-out plushy. Toss it ahead, and it lands as an invincible sphere of awesomeness! Blocking attacks and keeping my team safe inside our furry fortress

abilities.name: THE BIG TEST - UPGRADED
abilities.desc: Hey, player! Warm-up's over, time for the main event! Speed, healing, dashes, for me, and bonus HP for all! Smash enough baddies with the skills I say, and you unlock super buffs (massive speed and healing), plus Healing Factor resets. For some time after, each hit means more HP for the crew and you. Don't mess this up!
abilities.dur: The challenge lasts 12s. The buff lasts 8s after you complete it.

abilities.name: THE BAN HAMMER - UPGRADED
abilities.desc: Upgraded courtroom drama! Congrats, unlucky one! You're my pick; enjoy the taunt! I score bonus health and healing, and you take ongoing damage. If you miss an ability while court is in session, it's a double whammy. You get more pain, AND I get more extra HP! Thanks in advance!

abilities.name: DUAL DESERT EAGLES - DUELIST
abilities.desc: Bang! Bang! Unleash two hand cannons left and right, because one gun is never enough. Pew pew, baby!

abilities.name: SKILL ISSUE

abilities.name: HEADSHOT! - DUELIST
abilities.desc: Ever seen someone throw their own face? Watch me KO a crowd, then catch my mug on the rebound!. Don't lose your head over it

abilities.name: DEADPOOL IN YOUR AREA - DUELIST UPGRADED
abilities.desc: Check out the best trash talk in the Chronoverse! Keep taunting and melting their HP! I even block their screen, so they can't see squat. Plus, I tank hits like a champ. abilities.name: HAZARDOUS HIJINKS - DUELIST UPGRADED
abilities.desc: Now with bouncy castle action! Slash, bounce, repeat. It's like the world's deadliest pinball!. Cooldowns? Never heard of 'em. Keep going as long as you hit stuff, just don't let me fall flat on my ass!
abilities.cd_text: 2 charges, with each charge taking 10s to recharge.

abilities.name: HEADSHOT! - DUELIST UPGRADED
abilities.desc: Juggle my noggin for extra throws! If you catch it thrice, it goes kaboom. Everyone gets a piece of my mind
abilities.dur: First unleash: 1s; second unleash: 1s; third unleash: 2s

abilities.name: POP QUIZ! - UPGRADED
abilities.desc: Don't just stand there, you blockhead! The challenge's still rolling. But don't worry, I'm not one of those money-hungry scam artists. The buffs are on the house, no price hike. Take on this challenge, and you'll get three freebies: a little Speed boost, Continuous Healing, and Damage Up. Hit enough baddies with the right abilities exactly as I ask, and you unlock the ultimate bundle (Super Speed, Super Healing, Damage Boost AND reset all your cooldowns (except Healing Factor; no cheating!). Now THAT'S love
abilities.dur: The challenge lasts 12s. The buff lasts 8s after you complete it.

teamups.name: "HEL-YEAH, HONEY"
teamups.base: Receive upgrades from Hel, allowing the Desert Eagles or Katanas to be upgraded one additional time. Hel-Yeah Desert Eagles: Duelist and Vanguard gain pierce, and the thought bubbles transform into homing death-rattle bubbles. Strategist death-rattle bubbles also home in on allies, exploding to provide healing. Hel-Yeah Katanas: Every strike injects undead energy into the enemy. Hitting an enemy three times with the Katanas detonates the energy, dealing percentage-based true damage scaling off their max Health.
teamups.enhanced: When teaming up with Hela, BOTH the Desert Eagles and Katanas can be upgraded one extra time.

teamups.name: GUMBO CHIMICHANGAS
teamups.base: Activate for kinetic energy, propelling Deadpool in a forward leap. Upon landing, he scatters a ring of kinetically charged chimichangas that deal damage to enemies.
teamups.enhanced: When teaming up with Gambit, the kinetic energy causes Deadpool's landing to inflict a Stun effect on enemies in the blast radius.

received.name: Comical Chaos
received.desc: Deadpool hands Jeff the Land Shark a plushie with attitude. Jeff can spit it ahead where it'll continuously Taunt nearby enemies and Block Vision, while allies in range enjoy a plush-powered healing party!

heroes.name: DEVIL DINOSAUR
heroes.desc: Don't let his name scare you — Devil Dinosaur is actually a gentle giant. But with razor-sharp fangs, a mighty sweeping tail, a thunderous roar, and a force-field shield gifted by his human partner Moon Girl, it's no wonder why heroes and villains alike are intimidated by this prehistoric powerhouse!

abilities.name: Primal Bite
abilities.desc: Bite forward. Applies a Bleed that deals continuous Percentage Damage

abilities.name: Impact Beam
abilities.desc: Unleash a devastating beam of energy that inflicts a Bleed and Slow.

abilities.name: Buddy Barrier
abilities.desc: Activate the heart-shaped generator to expand a spherical shield that blocks incoming damage. Enemies caught within are Slowed

abilities.name: Savage Predation
abilities.desc: Dash and pounce on your prey with a vicious bite, applying a Bleed. If the target is already Bleeding, clamp down before hurling them away

abilities.name: Frenzied Feast
abilities.desc: Unleash a flurry of continuous bites, converting the damage dealt into Bonus Health. Deals extra damage against Bleeding targets

abilities.name: Prehistoric Plating
abilities.desc: Take reduced damage from headshots. Immune to launch-up, knock-back, and other displacement effects. Enemies and allies generate less Ultimate Ability Energy when damaging or healing him

abilities.name: Apex Advantage
abilities.desc: Gain Bonus Health when you inflict Bleeding upon an enemy

abilities.name: Devil-Beast Rampage
abilities.desc: Erupt in primal fury! Gain a massive Movement Speed Boost while unleashing earth-shattering stomps that Launch enemies and applies a Bleed. Thunderous roars also emit sonic waves that Slow enemies hit

teamups.name: PRIMAL PUNISHMENT
teamups.base: Adds a new ability. Upon activation, Primal Bite is replaced. Devil Dinosaur gains 2 magnetic cannons that can be fired forward; the cannonballs detonate when hitting enemies or the environment.
teamups.enhanced: When teaming up with The Punisher, the duo can request an interaction. Once accepted, The Punisher rides atop Devil Dinosaur, restricting him to only Adjudication/Deliverance and Scourge Grenade while disabling other abilities. While mounted, The Punisher gains Damage Reduction; Devil Dinosaur absorbs a portion of all damage inflicted on The Punisher.

teamups.name: SURF & TURF
teamups.base: Impact Beam is replaced by a frontal water spray. This stream damages enemies while providing healing to teammates.
teamups.enhanced: When teaming up with Jeff the Land Shark, Jeff can ride atop Devil Dinosaur's head. While riding, both gain some Damage Reduction and are swirled in therapeutic waters, receiving Continuous Healing. Jeff can only cast Joyful Splash, Aqua Burst, and Healing Bubble during this time.

received.name: Prehistoric Partner
received.desc: The Punisher rides atop Devil Dinosaur, restricting him to only Adjudication/Deliverance and Scourge Grenade while disabling other abilities. While mounted, Devil Dinosaur absorbs a portion of all damage inflicted on The Punisher

heroes.name: DOCTOR STRANGE
heroes.desc: As the Sorcerer Supreme, Doctor Stephen Strange gracefully wields ancient spells to turn the tide of even the most impossible battle. However, magic always comes at a cost, and each use of his arcane abilities gradually awakens the darkness within him.

abilities.name: Daggers of Denak
abilities.desc: Cast Daggers of Denak forward

abilities.name: Eye of Agamotto
abilities.desc: Separate nearby enemies' Souls from their bodies. Damage dealt to these Souls is transferred to their physical bodies

abilities.name: Cloak of Levitation
abilities.desc: Ascend and then enter a brief state of sustained flight

abilities.name: Maelstrom of Madness
abilities.desc: Release Dark Magic to deal damage to nearby enemies
abilities.dmg: Each point of Dark Magic deals 1.3 damage

abilities.name: Pentagram of Farallah
abilities.desc: Open portals between two locations, enabling all units to travel through them

abilities.name: Shield of the Seraphim
abilities.desc: Create a protective barrier against damage

abilities.name: Price of Magic
abilities.desc: Dark Magic accumulates with every hit on an enemy. If Dark Magic peaks for too long, Doctor Strange will be cursed with Anti-Heal

teamups.name: GAMMA MAELSTROM
teamups.base: Upgrade Maelstrom of Madness to Gamma Maelstrom. This drastically boosts energy charge rates and removes the Anti-Heal curse.
teamups.enhanced: When teaming up with Hulk, releasing Gamma Maelstrom retains some energy, and stored Gamma energy doesn't decay over time.
teamups.dmg: Each point of Dark Magic deals 1.3 damage.

teamups.name: PSIONIC VORTEX
teamups.base: Upgrade Maelstrom of Madness to Psionic Vortex. Enemies caught in are Launched toward you. Shield of the Seraphim also gains increased shield value.
teamups.enhanced: When teaming up with Invisible Woman, any damage dealt by Psionic Vortex provides proportional Bonus Health for Doctor Strange.
teamups.dmg: Each point of Dark Magic deals 1.3 damage.

received.name: Enchanted Enhancement
received.desc: Doctor Strange shares his arcane mastery, replacing Scarlet Witch's Chthonian Burst with Mystic Burst upon activation. Hold down the attack button to unleash a rapid, relentless salvo of magical missiles in the target direction

received.name: PSIONIC VORTEX
received.desc: Invisible Woman enhances Doctor Strange's Maelstrom of Madness with a psionic explosion. The explosion damages and pulls enemies toward Doctor Strange. Based on the explosion's damage, Doctor Strange and nearby allies gain Bonus Health

heroes.name: ELSA BLOODSTONE
heroes.desc: Born into a line of legendary monster hunters, Elsa Bloodstone boasts incredible physical prowess and an innate talent for subduing the creepiest of creatures. The instinct to hunt is in her blood, and every foe she faces inevitably becomes prey ensnared in her traps!

abilities.name: DOUBLE-BARREL BLASTER
abilities.desc: Fire your shotgun forward

abilities.name: MONSTER-PIERCER
abilities.desc: Unleash your elephant gun forward. Bullets pierce enemies and deal high damage

abilities.name: INHERITED INSTINCT
abilities.desc: Dealing damage increases hunting Instinct. Defeating enemies caught by Smoky Snare grants additional Instinct. Higher Instinct reduces the cooldown of Helix Advance

abilities.name: RUTHLESS PURSUIT
abilities.desc: Dash forward, gaining Bonus Health and launching enemies hit. Follow up with a Double-Barrel Blaster shot that propels you backward and Slows enemies. Using either stage empowers your next Double-Barrel Blaster, transforming it into Monster-Piercer

abilities.name: HELIX ADVANCE
abilities.desc: Dash forward. Your next Double-Barrel Blaster becomes Monster-Piercer

abilities.name: LIVING BULLET
abilities.desc: Fire a Living Bullet round that splits upon impact, seeking nearby enemies and marking each with a Spectral Sigil. Hitting marked targets with Double-Barrel Blaster or Monster-Piercer grants Elsa a brief Speed boost. Living Bullets deal extra damage to shields and enemies with Bonus Health

abilities.name: SMOKY SNARE
abilities.desc: Launch a trap containing the monster Diablo. Once deployed, it becomes Invisible and Invulnerable. When an enemy triggers it, Diablo Immobilizes and Damages them. Use to dash to the trapped enemy. Enemies can destroy Diablo to break free

abilities.name: APEX PREDATOR
abilities.desc: Summon the Glartrox to charge forward. The Glartrox can be recalled to charge back toward Elsa. When colliding with terrain or upon return, it bites fiercely, dealing heavy damage
abilities.dur: Maximum durations for dashing and returning are 3.5s each

teamups.name: PREHISTORIC TRAP
teamups.base: After deploying the Smoky Snare trap, Diablo will monitor the area. If enemies approach, Diablo Immobilizes and Damages them. He also releases a lethal gas, causing continuous area damage.
teamups.enhanced: When teaming up with Devil Dinosaur, Elsa can store and deploy two Smoky Snares.

teamups.name: LOUDMOUTH MERCS
teamups.base: Living Bullet changes to special rounds that Taunt targets with Deadpool's chatter, while Slowing, and damaging nearby enemies over time. After a timer, the bullet auto-recalls, healing Elsa based on the damage dealt while adding one extra gauge block to her Inherited Instinct passive cap.
teamups.enhanced: When teaming up with Deadpool, Deadpool breaks the fourth wall, significantly boosting Instinct acquisition rate.

received.name: BLOODSTONE'S BOOMBOX BULLETS
received.desc: Deadpool hands Jeff the Land Shark a plushie. Jeff can spit it ahead where it'll continuously Taunt nearby enemies and Block Vision, while allies in range are healed! Elsa Bloodstone's Living Bullet changes to special rounds that Taunt targets with Deadpool's chatter, while Slowing, and damaging nearby enemies over time. Elsa can recall the rounds to heal based on damage dealt

heroes.name: EMMA FROST
heroes.desc: For Emma Frost, war is the purest form of art. With her formidable telepathic abilities, she intricately weaves a deadly mental web that ensnares her foes, while her indestructible diamond form lets her lead her teammates fearlessly into the fray. Forever elegant and composed, Emma reigns as the one true queen of the battlefield!

abilities.name: TELEPATHIC PULSE
abilities.desc: Fire a psionic beam to deal damage; the longer the beam hits, the higher the damage
abilities.dmg: Damage increases with energy: 0 - 70/s, 99 - 110/s, full energy - 140/s

abilities.name: MIND'S AEGIS
abilities.desc: Create a levitating barrier at the designated location

abilities.name: PSYCHIC SPEAR
abilities.desc: Seize control of an enemy's sentience—damage dealt to the sentience cascades to the physical form and can be pierced by Telepathic Pulse. When the sentience shatters, it unleashes extra damage on its owner
abilities.dmg: Deal 5 damage per direct hit. When the sentience shatters, it deals damage to the target, which is equal to 25% of the target's maximum health

abilities.name: DIAMOND FORM
abilities.desc: Activate Diamond Form to transform your attack style while gaining Damage Reduction and becoming Unstoppable

abilities.name: FACETED FURY
abilities.desc: In Diamond Form, deliver a crushing double-fisted strike to enemies
abilities.dmg: First & second hit: 50; third hit: 70; fourth hit: 80

abilities.name: CRYSTAL KICK
