abilities.desc: Launch a tracking orb of vampiric energy that damages enemies and heals allies in its radius. Striking the orb or hitting targets near it charges it up, increasing both its size and healing power. Press {Interactive} to manually recall it.

abilities.name: Sparking Sprint
abilities.desc: Wrap yourself in vampiric energy to gain a Speed Boost. While active, jump height and Attack Speed are increased, and Energy Blasts can be fired at no cost

abilities.name: Dazzling Detonation
abilities.desc: Detonate a firework energy orb, dealing damage to enemies in the area and applying a Blind effect. The energy can also be transferred to an ally, granting them healing and a Speed Boost

abilities.name: Sparkle Mark
abilities.desc: Hitting targets with Dazzling Detonation and Firework Finale applies a Sparkle Mark. Energy Plasmoids can detonate marks, granting allies a Healing Boost and Bonus Health, while dealing burst damage and inflicting Vulnerability to enemies

abilities.name: Firework Finale
abilities.desc: Charge up and unleash a massive ring of outward-flying firework clusters, Knocking Back nearby enemies. These clusters then orbit you, creating a field that damages enemies and heals allies. Expanding the cluster radius outward will Launch Up struck enemies

teamups.name: HELLFIRE SPARKS
teamups.base: When Attack Speed is enhanced, Energy Plasmoids transform into a hitscan attack that grants self-healing on hit and is capable of dealing critical hits.
teamups.enhanced: When teaming up with The Hood, the Void Magic Mark is never cleared, allowing her to indefinitely sustain the hitscan attack form.

teamups.name: VAMPIRIC KIN
teamups.base: Deploy a Vampiric Field. Allies standing within the field gain Life Steal when attacking enemies.
teamups.enhanced: When teaming up with Blade, allies inside the field receive an additional Continuous Healing effect.

heroes.name: LOKI
heroes.desc: What greater thrill is there for a God of Mischief than to outsmart his foes? The cunning trickster Loki uses his illusions and shapeshifting abilities to weave in and out of combat, toying with enemies at every turn.

abilities.name: Mystical Missile
abilities.desc: Fire Mystical Missiles to heal allies or deal damage to enemies. Direct hits on allies provide extra healing
abilities.dmg: The projectile deals no damage, while the spell field inflicts 25 damage per cast

abilities.name: God of Mischief
abilities.desc: Shapeshift into a targeted ally or enemy hero and use all their abilities except any of their Team-Up Abilities

abilities.name: Regeneration Domain
abilities.desc: Use Rune Stones to create a magical field that provides allies Healing and converts incoming damage into further healing

abilities.name: Doppelganger
abilities.desc: Project an Illusion that can cast some of Loki's abilities
abilities.cd_text: 2 charges, with each charge taking 12s to recharge

abilities.name: Devious Exchange
abilities.desc: Swap with the selected Illusion

abilities.name: Backstab
abilities.desc: Pull out a dagger to stab enemies, dealing extra damage when attacking an enemy from behind

abilities.name: Deception
abilities.desc: Become Invisible and conjure an Illusion to deceive enemies
abilities.heal: Health regenerates at a rate of 20 Health per second while invisible

teamups.name: VILLAIN'S ILLUSION
teamups.base: Gain a new ability to target fallen heroes (friend or foe), letting Loki assume their form for a set time (cannot cast their Ultimate Ability).
teamups.enhanced: When teaming up with Hela, Loki's transformation lasts slightly longer. Furthermore, taking lethal damage while transformed or in his Ultimate Ability state will merely revert him back to Loki with a sliver of Health, preventing a KO.

teamups.name: VIBRANT VITALITY
teamups.base: Gain a new ability to target fallen heroes (friend or foe), letting Loki assume their form for a set time (cannot cast their Ultimate Ability).
teamups.enhanced: When teaming up with Hela, Loki's transformation lasts slightly longer. Furthermore, taking lethal damage while transformed or in his Ultimate Ability state will merely revert him back to Loki with a sliver of Health, preventing a KO

received.name: Deific Blessing
received.desc: Mantis enhances Groot's wooden walls and Loki's Rune Stones with life energy. Groot can additionally unleash a Flower Wall, which, when in Flora Colossus state, restores health to random nearby allies and grants them Damage Reduction. Loki's Rune Stones grant allies within Regeneration Domain a Damage Boost

heroes.name: LUNA SNOW
heroes.desc: Equal parts pop star and Super Hero, Luna Snow puts on a dazzling show with both her light and dark ice powers. The arena is her stage, where Seol Hee and her team orchestrate spectacular displays that earn her an ever-increasing number of fans and wins.

abilities.name: Light & Dark Ice
abilities.desc: Fire ice shots that damage enemies or heal allies
abilities.dmg: 24 damage per round, for a total of 72 damage
abilities.heal: 24 health per round, for a total of 72 health

abilities.name: Fate of Both Worlds
abilities.desc: Take center stage and start dancing! Press to toggle between two performances: Heal allies or grant them Damage Boost

abilities.name: Ice Arts
abilities.desc: Fire ice shards for a short duration, damaging enemies or healing allies while restoring her own Health

abilities.name: Share the Stage
abilities.desc: Attach Idol Aura to an ally. Allies with Idol Aura also restore Health when Luna Snow is healing others

abilities.name: Absolute Zero
abilities.desc: Cast a clump of ice to Freeze the hit enemy and restore Health

abilities.name: Cryo Heart
abilities.desc: Automatically restore Health when casting Ice Arts or Absolute Zero

abilities.name: Smooth Skate
abilities.desc: Keep moving forward to start ice skating and enable higher jumps

abilities.name: Number One Idol
abilities.desc: Boost Healing. Gain extra healing when healing others

teamups.name: ATLAS BOND
teamups.base: Unleash a spirit fox forward that Charms enemies while healing any allies in its path. Activating the ability instantly cleanses all negative status effects on Luna Snow.
teamups.enhanced: When teaming up with White Fox, the spirit fox automatically returns after reaching its maximum distance, and the self-cleanse is retained.

teamups.name: DUALITY DANCE
teamups.base: Cast Soul Bond to tether all characters within range. Attacking tethered enemies or healing linked allies restores your Health.
teamups.enhanced: When teaming up with Adam Warlock, scoring critical hits with Light & Dark Ice reduces the cooldowns of Absolute Zero and Ice Arts.

received.name: ICED OUT DIAMOND
received.desc: Luna Snow grants Winter's Chill to Iron Fist and Emma Frost. When Iron Fist activates Harmony Recovery, he can heal nearby allies with Lunar Chi. Emma Frost can project ice energy forward, dealing damage and slowing enemies. She can also enhance her diamond form, condensing frost into an Absolute Zero Diamond barrier that blocks enemy attacks and movement

received.name: SPIRIT FOX ACCORD
received.desc: White Fox grants Luna Snow a spirit fox for protection. Luna can activate it for a burst of speed and fire it forward, healing allies in its path while applying Charm to enemies

heroes.name: MAGIK
heroes.desc: Trained in the dark arts and wielding her mighty Soulsword, Magik leaps through portals to navigate the arena with ease. Once Illyana transforms into the demonic Darkchild, all who dare stand against her will fall before her merciless blade.

abilities.name: Soulsword
abilities.desc: Slash forward with the Soulsword

abilities.name: Darkchild
abilities.desc: Transform into Darkchild, gaining enhancements to all her abilities

abilities.name: Stepping Discs
abilities.desc: Jump through a Stepping Disc, teleporting a short distance in the direction of movement. Become Invincible while teleporting

abilities.name: Umbral Incursion
abilities.desc: Dash forward and launch up enemies

abilities.name: Eldritch Whirl
abilities.desc: Spin while swinging the Soulsword after exiting a Stepping Disc

abilities.name: Magik Slash
abilities.desc: Strike forward an air slash
abilities.dmg: 45 - 81 (Maximum damage is achieved after 1.2s of charging)

abilities.name: Demon's Rage
abilities.desc: Summon a Limbo demon that attacks enemies after exiting a Stepping Disc

abilities.name: Limbo's Might
abilities.desc: Convert damage inflicted on enemies into Bonus Health to herself

abilities.name: Soulsword
abilities.desc: Slash forward with the Soulsword
abilities.dmg: Deals 3 hits at intervals of 0.15s, with each hit dealing 35 damage

abilities.name: Stepping Discs
abilities.desc: Jump through a Stepping Disc, teleporting a short distance in the direction of movement. Become Invincible while teleporting

abilities.name: Umbral Incursion
abilities.desc: Dash forward and launch up enemies

abilities.name: Eldritch Whirl
abilities.desc: Spin while swinging the Soulsword after exiting a Stepping Disc
abilities.dmg: Deals 3 hits at intervals of 0.25s, each dealing 45 damage

abilities.name: Magik Slash
abilities.desc: Strike forward an air slash
abilities.dmg: 90 - 180 (Maximum damage is achieved after 1.8s of charging)

abilities.name: Demon's Rage
abilities.desc: Summon a Limbo demon that attacks enemies after exiting a Stepping Disc

teamups.name: CHAIN OF CYTTORAK
teamups.base: Chain of Cyttorak can tether two enemies simultaneously, dragging both targets to the same location.
teamups.enhanced: When teaming up with Doctor Strange, Chain of Cyttorak can tether multiple enemies at once, pulling the entire group to a singular point.

teamups.name: VOID PENTAGRAM
teamups.base: Casting Stepping Discs within an Hellish Magic Circle refunds energy, and each use of Stepping Discs summons a Limbo Demon.
teamups.enhanced: When teaming up with The Hood, the summoned Limbo Demons have heavily increased Health and a wider attack range.

received.name: CHAIN OF CYTTORAK
received.desc: Doctor Strange shares his arcane mastery with Scarlet Witch and Magik. Scarlet Witch's Chthonian Burst is replaced with Mystic Burst upon activation. Hold down the attack button to unleash a rapid, relentless salvo of magical missiles in the target direction. Magik can unleash a Chain of Cyttorak that links two enemies and slows them; the farther they are apart, the greater the Slow effect inflicted during the link

heroes.name: MAGNETO
heroes.desc: The Master of Magnetism bends even the strongest metal to his whims, shielding his allies and striking at his foes. Whether he calls himself Max Eisenhardt, Erik Lehnsherr, or simply Magneto, the hardships this warrior has endured have made him as unbreakable as the steel he brandishes.

abilities.name: Iron Volley
abilities.desc: Fire a volley of magnetic orbs forward. The range of the resulting explosion increases based on distance flown
abilities.dmg: Projectile Damage: 40. The spell field deals 40 damage at its center, reducing to 50% within a 3m radius from the center

abilities.name: Meteor M
abilities.desc: Draw in all materials around to forge an iron meteor that deals massive damage upon impact. Absorbing enemy projectiles can enhance the meteor's power, yet overloading will cause it to self-destruct
abilities.dmg: The projectile deals no damage. The base damage at the center of the spell field starts at 100 and increases to 350 when fully charged. Each point of Energy adds an extra 3 points of damage to the spell field, with damage reducing to 50% at a distance of 6m from the center

abilities.name: Metallic Curtain
abilities.desc: Change the magnetic field around to form a metallic curtain, blocking all incoming projectiles

abilities.name: Metal Bulwark
abilities.desc: Conjure a metal shield around a chosen ally. Damage taken will transform into rings on Magneto's back

abilities.name: Iron Bulwark
abilities.desc: Conjure an iron shield around himself. Damage taken will transform into rings on Magneto's back

abilities.name: Mag-Cannon
abilities.desc: Convert the iron rings on Magneto's back into a Mag-Cannon and launch a metallic mass forward. Higher stacks of rings increase damage, and full stacks knock back enemies
abilities.cd_text: No cooldown, but the ability can only be activated when the Iron Ring has at least one charge
abilities.dmg: Iron Rings' first charge deals 40 damage, the second charge deals 65 damage, and the third charge deals 90 damage

abilities.name: Magnetic Descent
abilities.desc: Hold Space to fall slowly

teamups.name: METALLIC CHAOS
teamups.base: Summons a Chaos Greatsword that deals damage to enemies in front.
teamups.enhanced: When teaming up with Scarlet Witch, Magnetic Cannon becomes a charged ability. Charging consumes passive energy, and each energy segment consumed fires a Chaos Greatsword that deals damage to enemies.

teamups.name: MAGNETIC RESONANCE
teamups.base: Cast a magnetic projection that mimics Magneto's movement and ability casts perfectly from the enemy's perspective.
teamups.enhanced: When teaming up with Emma Frost, the magnetic projection receives a massive Health bump and will persist indefinitely unless destroyed or manually recalled.

received.name: ROYAL BLADE
received.desc: Gambit charges Magneto's greatsword with kinetic energy. When Magneto activates this ability, Iron Volley is replaced with Ace Greatsword, which detonates upon striking enemies. The explosion leaves residual kinetic energy within the target, inflicting secondary damage after a brief delay

heroes.name: MANTIS
heroes.desc: Mantis uses her impressive mental abilities and her penchant for plant control to anchor any team she fights alongside. Her powers tap into a limitless flow of life energy, gently nourishing everything she touches.

abilities.name: Life Energy Blast
abilities.desc: Fire an energy thorn and regain one Life Orb after a critical hit.

abilities.name: Soul Resurgence
abilities.desc: Release energy around her while moving, providing Healing Over Time and Movement Boosts for surrounding allies. Excess healing converts to Bonus Health

abilities.name: Spore Slumber
abilities.desc: Throw a spore to Sedate the nearest enemy

abilities.name: Allied Inspiration
abilities.desc: Consume Life Orbs to grant allies a Damage Boost

abilities.name: Natural Anger
abilities.desc: Consume Life Orbs to grant herself a Damage Boost
abilities.dur: 8s (the duration cannot stack; repeatedly casting will only refresh the duration)

abilities.name: Healing Flower
abilities.desc: Consume Life Orbs to grant allies Healing Over Time

abilities.name: Nature's Favor
abilities.desc: Receive a Movement Boost when not injured and Healing Over Time when consuming Life Orbs

teamups.name: STAR BLOSSOM
teamups.base: Recasting Healing Flower on a teammate with the effect enhances and spreads the healing aura.
teamups.enhanced: When teaming up with Star-Lord, using Healing Flower on any teammate instantly triggers the enhanced Spell Field and healing effect.

teamups.name: VITALITY PACT
teamups.base: Upon defeat, Mantis can freely move as a soul, healing nearby allies, and reforge her body at a chosen spot. After using Natural Anger, the effect of Nature's Favor is enhanced, increasing the amount of healing provided.
teamups.enhanced: When teaming up with Adam Warlock, her soul state can forge Soul Bond with nearby teammates, granting Healing Over Timeand distributing damage taken across the bond.

received.name: Heavenly Guardian
received.desc: Mantis enhances Groot's wooden walls and Loki's Rune Stones with life energy. Groot can additionally unleash a Flower Wall, which, when in Flora Colossus state, restores health to random nearby allies and grants them Damage Reduction. Loki's Rune Stones grant allies within Regeneration Domain a Damage Boost

heroes.name: MISTER FANTASTIC
heroes.desc: Reed Richards believes that true strength comes from remaining flexible, both mentally and physically. Mister Fantastic's elastic body, which can twist and stretch into any form with ease, is almost as impressive as his brilliant mind.

abilities.name: Stretch Punch
abilities.desc: Stretch out a forward punch to attack enemies

abilities.name: Distended Grip
abilities.desc: Extend arms forward to entangle an enemy, then press Primary Attack to pull the hit enemy toward him, or select and yank another enemy, Knocking Them Airborne against each other. Hit targets are Immobilized

abilities.name: Flexible Elongation
abilities.desc: Gain a Shield, select a target and dash towards them, dealing damage to enemies or granting a Shield to allies

abilities.name: Reflexive Rubber
abilities.desc: Stretch the body to absorb damage before launching stored damage in the targeted direction

abilities.name: Brainiac Bounce
abilities.desc: Leap upward and smash the ground, slowing enemies within range. Mister Fantastic can leap again upon landing a hit

abilities.name: Elastic Strength
abilities.desc: Using abilities generates Elasticity, boosting attack power. Reaching full Elasticity triggers an Inflated state that increases Maximum Health, further boosts damage, and enables the use of Reflexive Rubber

teamups.name: FANTASTIC AMPLIFIER
teamups.base: Equips the Fantastic Amplifier. For the duration, Mister Fantastic's maximum Elasticity is increased, and he can actively enter Inflation State.
teamups.enhanced: When teaming up with Rocket Raccoon, Brainiac Bounce Launches hit enemies.

teamups.name: CLOBBERIN' RESEARCH DEPT.
teamups.base: In brawler stance, Stretch Punch becomes a charged ability, firing a forward Brawling Punch. Hitting an enemy grants Bonus Health scaling with damage, and a full charge Launches hit enemies.
teamups.enhanced: When teaming up with The Thing, while in the brawling stance, Distended Grip also becomes a charged ability, slamming down a Distended Hammer. Hitting enemies grants Bonus Health based on damage, and Launches enemies at full charge.

received.name: FANTASTIC AMPLIFIER
received.desc: Rocket Raccoon upgrades his B.R.B. for Star-Lord and Mister Fantastic. Star-Lord gets an Astral Jump device, allowing him to teleport to its deployment point from anywhere on the map. Mister Fantastic receives a Fantastic Amplifier, removing his Elasticity limit and letting him actively enter Inflation state

heroes.name: MOON KNIGHT
heroes.desc: As the avatar of the Egyptian God of Vengeance, Marc Spector's body has been enhanced by Khonshu himself. Bathed in a luminous aura that pierces the darkness, Moon Knight glides through the night, ready to sear his enemies with his master's sacred Ankhs.

abilities.name: Crescent Dart
abilities.desc: Unleash Crescent Darts forward that can bounce between enemies and Ankhs, dealing damage to enemies

abilities.name: Hand of Khonshu
abilities.desc: Open a portal that allows Khonshu to bombard enemies with his talons

abilities.name: Night Glider
abilities.desc: Hold SHIFT to glide

abilities.name: Ancient Ankh
abilities.desc: Fire an Ankh to launch up enemies within its radius towards the center

abilities.name: Moonlight Hook
abilities.desc: Launch a frontal grappling hook that pulls Moon Knight towards it

abilities.name: Rising Leap
abilities.desc: Perform a double jump

abilities.name: Moon Blade
abilities.desc: Launch forward a Moon Blade that can bounce between enemies and Ankhs, dealing damage to enemies

abilities.name: Triple Eclipse
abilities.desc: Perform a combo with his truncheon, and the third strike will launch up the enemy hit slightly

teamups.name: LUMINOUS MOON
teamups.base: Enter Phased state and dash forward. Upon concluding, emit a Light Energy Healing Wave that heals Moon Knight and nearby allies.
teamups.enhanced: When teaming up with Cloak & Dagger, the Phased state duration is extended, the dash distance increases, and the Light Energy Healing Wave boasts a larger radius and stronger healing output.

teamups.name: BLOOD MOON
teamups.base: Deploy an Ankh Trap. Upon triggering, an Ankh materializes at the location, while summoning a single Talon of Khonshu to Launch enemies toward the trap's center.
teamups.enhanced: When teaming up with Elsa Bloodstone, triggering the trap summons multiple Talons of Khonshu to bombard the area.

received.name: MOON GOD'S CHOSEN
received.desc: Blessed by Khonshu, Blade gains a new ability. When activated, Blade swings his Ancestral Sword in a powerful slash, dashing forward a short distance. At the end of the dash, he swiftly slashes four times, each strike sending a Darkmoon Blade forward. When a Darkmoon Blade hits an enemy, it bounces to nearby targets

heroes.name: NAMOR
heroes.desc: The unrivaled King of the Seas, Namor surfs into battle on a mighty wave with an army of fierce aquatic creatures in his wake. When ancient horns of war blare, devastation soon follows as deadly waters engulf the arena.

abilities.name: Trident of Neptune
abilities.desc: Throw the trident forward, reducing Aquatic Dominion's cooldown upon enemy impact. Critical hits cause Monstro Spawn to enter a berserk state, gaining increased Attack Speed

abilities.name: Horn of Proteus
abilities.desc: Summon Giganto to leap atop enemies within range, disabling their mobility abilities
abilities.dmg: Inner Circle Damage: 500; Outer Circle Damage: 180

abilities.name: Blessing of the Deep
abilities.desc: Summon a protective barrier while flying upwards

abilities.name: Aquatic Dominion
abilities.desc: Summon a Monstro Spawn that can autonomously attack enemies

abilities.name: Wrath of the Seven Seas
abilities.desc: Launch the trident forward to damage nearby enemies, then direct all Monstro Spawn to perform an enhanced attack on the nearest hit enemy. When the trident hits an enemy, Monstro Spawn to enter a berserk state, gaining increased Attack Speed

teamups.name: GAMMA MONSTRO
teamups.base: Summon an extra Gamma Monstro that continuously damages the nearest enemy. Upon landing critical hits, the Gamma Monstro gains increased Attack Speed. Hitting an enemy with Wrath of the Seven Seas prompts it to fire a powerful beam.
teamups.enhanced: When teaming up with Hulk, casting Blessing of the Deep creates a water barrier infused with Gamma energy. Standing inside accelerates the Gamma Monstro cooldown and grants it a Damage Boost.

teamups.name: CHILLING CHARISMA
teamups.base: Gain a new ability to summon a Frost Tide forward. The wave damages, Pushes Back, and inflicts a Slow on all enemies hit.
teamups.enhanced: When teaming up with Luna Snow, the Frost Tide gains 1 charge and crashes down upon reaching its maximum range, dealing area damage and Slowing enemies caught near the endpoint.

received.name: TIDAL DIRGE
received.desc: Hela channels energy of the undead to empower Namor. When Namor strikes with his trident, a spectral water column erupts at the target area, slowing enemies hit. Whenever Hela or Namor assist in a KO, an invulnerable Undead Monstro spawns at the fallen enemy's position, automatically attacking the nearest foe for a short time before vanishing

heroes.name: PENI PARKER
heroes.desc: Peni Parker may be young, but she bravely stands on the frontlines to protect the Web of Life and Destiny. Together, this teen prodigy and her state-of-the-art mech, the sensational SP//dr, make for the most thrilling duo on the battlefield!

abilities.name: Cyber-Web Cluster
abilities.desc: Launch forward a Cyber-Web Cluster

abilities.name: Spider-Sweeper
abilities.desc: Enhance the SP//dr suit, launching up enemies in its path and deploying Arachno-Mines, Spider-Drones, and Cyber-Webs repeatedly

abilities.name: Bionic Spider-Nest
abilities.desc: Generate a Bionic Spider-Nest at a targeted area, periodically spawning Spider-Drones and creating Cyber-Webs. While in the Cyber-Web, Peni and allies gain Healing Over Time and a Movement Boost. Excess healing converts into Bonus Health. Spider-Drones inflict a Slow effect on hit, which can stack and refresh its effect period with multiple hits

abilities.name: Arachno-Mine
abilities.desc: Deploy Arachno-Mines that can be concealed within the confines of a Cyber-Web
abilities.cd_text: 4 charges, with each charge taking 4s to recharge

abilities.name: Cyber-Bond
abilities.desc: Shoot a web strand that links to the targeted area or Cyber-Web. If stretched too far, it will trigger a pullback

abilities.name: Wall Crawl
abilities.desc: HOLD Jump to crawl on vertical surfaces

abilities.name: Cyber-Web Snare
abilities.desc: Cast futuristic webbing that Immobilizes enemies or creates a Cyber-Web. While in the Cyber-Web, Peni and allies gain Healing Over Time and a Movement Boost. Excess healing converts into Bonus Health

teamups.name: VIBRANIUM MECH
teamups.base: Upon activation, briefly grants Cyber-Web Clusteran Attack Speedand DamageBoost.
teamups.enhanced: When teaming up with Black Panther, activating the ability deploys a frontal Vibranium Shield, while reducing the Vibranium Energy cost of Cyber-Web Cluster.

teamups.name: ROCKET NETWORK
teamups.base: Deploy an Armored Spider-Nestthat periodically drops Spider-Dronesand Armor Packsthat grant Bonus Health.
teamups.enhanced: When teaming up with Rocket Raccoon, the Armored Spider-Nestpassively regenerates its own Health. Furthermore, Rocket's B.R.B.will generate Cyber-Webs, and spawn both Spider-Dronesand Arachno-Mines.

received.name: ARMORIZED SPIDER-NEST
received.desc: Enhanced by Rocket Raccoon, Peni Parker’s Bionic Spider-Nest regularly generates strengthened armor packs. Each armor pack grants bonus health to the hero who picks up the pack. Peni Parker can deploy Bionic Spider-Nest and Armored Spider-Nest at the same time

received.name: Cyber-Spiders
received.desc: Peni Parker whips up a Sticky Bomb for Spider-Man! Prime it, then toss it before the timer's up for a blast that damages nearby enemies and attaches a Spider-Tracer to them. If not thrown in time, it explodes on Spider-Man, recharging a Web-Cluster shot and granting Bonus Health

heroes.name: PHOENIX
heroes.desc: Original X-Man Jean Grey boasted immense psychic power even before becoming host the unbridled Phoenix Force, embodiment of life and psionic energy across the universe. Now aligned with this ancient cosmic power, Jean and the Phoenix traverse space together, burning bright as both a spark of creation and inferno of destruction!

abilities.name: Cosmic Flames
abilities.desc: Launch a fiery projectile forward, applying 1 Spark to enemies hit. Critical hits apply 2 Sparks. At 3 Sparks, Phoenix triggers a fiery explosion that applies 1 Spark to enemies around and Healing Over Time to self. Sparks from explosions will not stack within a brief period

abilities.name: Telekinesis Burst
abilities.desc: Mark a targeted area with psionic energy, followed by a series of fiery explosions. The first blast Stuns enemies, while the subsequent two explosions inflict Slow. Applies 1 Spark to enemies hit

abilities.name: Dark Ascent
abilities.desc: Merge with the Phoenix, entering a state of free flight. Gain a Movement Boost

abilities.name: Telepathic Illusion
abilities.desc: Leave behind an illusion and instantly teleport in the desired direction, followed by detonating the illusion. Enemies hit are applied with 1 Spark

abilities.name: Endsong Inferno
abilities.desc: Soar into the sky with the Phoenix and crash down onto a selected area, dealing devastating damage to enemies while creating a shockwave that destroys enemy summons, shields, and any Bonus Health. Enemies hit are applied with 1 Spark

teamups.name: CIRCLE OF LIFE
teamups.base: Psionic Detonation is replaced by Phoenix Netherfire, applying a Telekinetic Mark to the targeted location. Upon hitting, it triggers an initial small explosion that briefly Stuns enemies, followed by two larger explosions that apply a Healing Reduction effect. Every single blast inflicts Sparks onto the enemies.
teamups.enhanced: When teaming up with Hela, every blast in the sequence applies multiple stacks of Sparks to enemies caught within.

teamups.name: TELEKINETIC BEATDOWN
teamups.base: Fire a telekinetic shockwave forward. If it lands, the Phoenix Force rushes the enemy and delivers a powerful punch. If there are other targets nearby, the Phoenix Force rapidly blinks between them to strike them as well, inflicting Sparks on each victim while healing Phoenix.
teamups.enhanced: When teaming up with Rogue, the width of the telekinetic shockwave expands, and the Phoenix Force's target detection range is increased.

received.name: Mind's Grace
received.desc: Jean Grey imbues Wolverine with the awe-inspiring Phoenix Force

heroes.name: PSYLOCKE
heroes.desc: The psychic warrior known as Sai has the Mutant ability to conjure a variety of weapons with the power of her mind. Gracefully gliding across the battlefield, this trained ninja can shatter the enemy's defenses with a single thought.

abilities.name: Psionic Crossbow
abilities.desc: Unleash bolts with psionic crossbows to damage enemies and reduce the cooldowns of all her abilities

abilities.name: Dance of the Butterfly
abilities.desc: Slash nearby enemies with a psionic katana, dealing massive damage

abilities.name: Psi-Blade Dash
abilities.desc: Dash forward and slice through enemies along the path with psionic blades

abilities.name: Psychic Stealth
abilities.desc: Enter stealth and gain a Movement Boost

abilities.name: Wing Shurikens
abilities.desc: Launch a volley of psionic shurikens that stick to enemies, dealing damage and granting herself Bonus Health. Press again to recall the shurikens

teamups.name: MENTAL PROJECTION
teamups.base: Create an illusory projection that automatically dashes forward to use Psi-Blade Dash, while Psylocke enters Stealth. If Psylocke attacks, the illusion mimics her strikes.
teamups.enhanced: When teaming up with Emma Frost, Psylocke's mental powers are elevated, allowing her to reactivate the ability to instantly swap places with her illusion.

teamups.name: LIGHT & DARK DARTS
teamups.base: Unleash a ring of Light Darts in all directions that damage enemies and restore Psylocke's Health upon impact, leaving behind a Shadow Domain. Staying inside the domain for a short time will re-enter Stealth.
teamups.enhanced: When teaming up with Cloak & Dagger, the radius of the Shadow Domain expands, and each time re-entering Stealth, the Light Darts are fired in all directions again.

received.name: LIGHT & DARK DARTS
received.desc: Cloak & Dagger share light and dark energy with Hawkeye and Psylocke. When Hawkeye uses Crescent Slash, he also releases a blade wave that heals and boosts healing for teammates, while inflicting damage and Vulnerability on enemies. Psylocke can launch a Light Boomerang Dart that heals allies, harms enemies, and provides her with temporary healing upon return. She can also unleash a ring of Dark Darts that slow enemies while she briefly enters a Phased state

heroes.name: ROCKET RACCOON
heroes.desc: Rocket may not look like a tech genius or an expert tactician, but anyone who's ever made his hit list has quickly regretted underestimating him. This savvy space soldier is equally eager to boost his teammates and to collect bounties on his foes.

abilities.name: Bombard Mode
abilities.desc: Fire energy projectiles that deal damage

abilities.name: Repair Mode
abilities.desc: Shoot bouncing spheres to heal allies

abilities.name: C.Y.A.
abilities.desc: Deploy a Cosmic Yarn Amplifier that grants allies a Damage Boost

abilities.name: Jetpack Dash
abilities.desc: Dash forward
abilities.cd_text: 2 charges, with each charge taking 10s to recharge

abilities.name: B.R.B.
abilities.desc: Deploy a Battle Rebirth Beacon that revives a fallen ally and periodically produces armor packs and rocket jet packs
abilities.cd_text: 40s. You can reclaim the beacon by pressing E. When reclaimed, the cooldown will be reduced based on the beacon's remaining health. If you reclaim a full-health beacon, the minimum cooldown will be 5s

abilities.name: Wild Crawl
abilities.desc: Hold Space to run on a wall

abilities.name: Flying Ace
abilities.desc: Hold Space to fall slowly

teamups.name: MAMMALIAN BOND
teamups.base: Tosses out a scattered batch of augmented Vitality Acorns. Acorns that hit the floor can be collected. Whether struck directly or picked up, teammates receive a burst of healing and global cooldown reduction.
teamups.enhanced: When teaming up with Squirrel Girl, the maximum charge count for this ability is increased.
teamups.cd_text: 3 charges, with each charge taking 20s to recharge.

teamups.name: PLANET X PALS
teamups.base: Converts Bombard Mode to launch Thorny Spores. Upon impact, they deal continuous damage to enemies within the radius while healing and granting Bonus Health to allies.
teamups.enhanced: When teaming up with Groot, Rocket can ride on Groot's shoulders, and the active duration of the Thorny Spores field is extended.

received.name: Old Friends
received.desc: Jeff the Land Shark and Rocket Raccoon can ride on Groot's shoulders, receiving Damage Reduction

heroes.name: ROGUE
heroes.desc: Anna Marie possesses the Mutant ability to absorb the powers of others with a touch. Her ever-adaptable arsenal of superhuman abilities helps turn the tide of any fight. After touching Raw Chronovium, Rogue's strength soared to new heights, allowing her to overwhelm enemies with unstoppable force!

abilities.name: Power Surge Punch
abilities.desc: Punch forward with both fists
abilities.dmg: The first two strikes deal 35 damage, while the third strike deals 45 damage

abilities.name: Defensive Stance
abilities.desc: Absorb nearby projectiles and reduce incoming damage; absorbed damage powers up your next Southern Brawl

abilities.name: Southern Brawl
abilities.desc: While in Defensive Stance, dash forward and slam enemies in front, dealing area damage

abilities.name: Chrono Kick Combo
abilities.desc: Dash forward and launch the enemy, entering flight; activate again to Knock Down nearby enemies. Your next two Power Surge Punch attacks become ranged, piercing enemies and granting Bonus Health

abilities.name: Fatal Attraction
abilities.desc: Dash forward. Press again to unleash a burst of Chronovium Power, dealing continuous damage to nearby foes; after a delay, the energy retracts, pulling all enemies towards Rogue

abilities.name: Ability Absorption
abilities.desc: Dash forward to knock down your target and absorb their energy; after absorbing, replace Ability Absorption with one of their abilities or refresh Fatal Attraction. Also absorb Health and stats based on their role

abilities.name: Heartbreaker
abilities.desc: Continuously absorb Ultimate Ability Energy from nearby enemies and steal stats based on their role

teamups.name: MR. & MRS. X
teamups.base: After activation, every attack triggers a kinetic explosion, dealing area damage to surrounding enemies while simultaneously healing nearby allies.
teamups.enhanced: When teaming up with Gambit, Rogue remains permanently locked in the "Hearts as One" state.

teamups.name: EXPLOSIVE ENTANGLEMENT
teamups.base: Defensive Stance is fortified. Activating the ability expands a magnetic field, drastically boosting the Damage Reduction ratio of Defensive Stance. Furthermore, all damage absorbed by the field is converted directly into damage for Southern Brawl.
teamups.enhanced: When teaming up with Magneto, Southern Brawl Knocks back enemies. Extra damage is dealt if they're propelled into a wall.

received.name: HEARTS AS ONE
received.desc: Gambit shares kinetic energy with Magneto and Rogue. When Magneto activates this ability, Iron Volley is replaced with Ace Greatsword, which detonates upon striking enemies. The explosion leaves residual kinetic energy within the target, inflicting secondary damage after a brief delay. When Rogue activates the ability, each of her attacks causes a kinetic explosion that damages nearby enemies and heals nearby allies

heroes.name: SCARLET WITCH
heroes.desc: Wanda Maximoff is adept at harnessing formidable chaos magic, casting hexes with the power to twist and reshape reality itself. Energy, space, and matter are mere playthings in the hands of Scarlet Witch!

abilities.name: Chaos Control
abilities.desc: Unleash Chaos Magic on enemies to deal damage and restore Chaos Energy

abilities.name: Reality Erasure
abilities.desc: Engage in free-flight while charging energy, then unleash it to deal massive damage

abilities.name: Mystic Projection
abilities.desc: Enter the Phased state for free-flight. Press again to exit early

abilities.name: Dark Seal
abilities.desc: Land a hit on a target or the scene, or press E to generate a Force Field that periodically Stuns enemies within range

abilities.name: Telekinesis
abilities.desc: Hold Space to fall slowly

abilities.name: Chthonian Burst
abilities.desc: Consume Chaos Energy to fire explosive magic missiles, damaging enemies

teamups.name: SORCERERS SUPREME
teamups.base: Chthonian Burst is replaced with Mystic Burst upon activation. Hold down the attack button to unleash a rapid, relentless salvo of magical missiles in the target direction.
teamups.enhanced: When teaming up with Doctor Strange, Scarlet Witch's maximum total Chaos Energy pool increases, and Chaos Control generates energy much faster when attacking.

teamups.name: HEX FIREWORKS
teamups.base: Infuse firework energy into the Dark Seal forcefield, turning it into a Plasmoid Seal, allowing for a secondary blast. After expanding the Plasmoid Seal, pressing the {Ability1} key again while it persists will detonate the fireworks, dealing damage and inflicting Vulnerability.
teamups.enhanced: When teaming up with Jubilee, Scarlet Witch receives constant healing from the firework energy while using Mystic Projection.

received.name: Sorcery Surge
received.desc: Doctor Strange shares his arcane mastery, replacing Scarlet Witch's Chthonian Burst with Mystic Burst upon activation. Hold down the attack button to unleash a rapid, relentless salvo of magical missiles in the target direction

heroes.name: SPIDER-MAN
heroes.desc: Swinging around the arena on his signature weblines, your friendly neighborhood Spider-Man, AKA Peter Parker, catches his rivals by surprise with sneaky, sticky bursts of webbing and unexpected attacks from above. Look out… here comes the Spider-Man!

abilities.name: Spider-Power
abilities.desc: Swing fists forward to strike, dealing extra damage to the enemy with a Spider-Tracer

abilities.name: Web-Cluster
abilities.desc: Shoot a Web-Cluster that deals damage and attaches a Spider-Tracer to the hit enemy

abilities.name: Spectacular Spin
abilities.desc: Launch Web-Clusters all around to damage and Stun enemies

abilities.name: Web-Swing
abilities.desc: Shoot a strand of webbing to swing.

abilities.name: Get Over Here!
abilities.desc: Shoot webbing to reel in the hit enemy. If the enemy is tagged with a Spider-Tracer, Spider-Man will get pulled to them instead

abilities.name: Amazing Combo
abilities.desc: Launch an enemy upward, dealing extra damage to the enemy with a Spider-Tracer

abilities.name: Thwip and Flip
abilities.desc: Perform a double jump

abilities.name: Spider-Sense
abilities.desc: Give a warning of enemies that have been around

abilities.name: Wall Crawl
abilities.desc: Press Space to wall crawl, and while crawling, left-click to sprint

teamups.name: SYMBIOTE BOND
teamups.base: Venom shares a part of his symbiote with Spider-Man, activating their symbiote abilities. Spider-Man can convert the symbiotes into explosive spikes that inflict harm on nearby enemies and relentlessly drive them back.
teamups.enhanced: When teaming up with Venom, this triggers additional Touch of Klyntar tendrils that continuously tether and damage enemies on top of the base effect.

teamups.name: PARKER POWER-UP
teamups.base: Peni Parker whips up a Sticky Spider-Bomb for Spider-Man! Prime it, then toss it before the timer's up for a blast that damages nearby enemies and attaches a Spider-Tracer to them. If not thrown in time, it explodes on Spider-Man, recharging all Web-Cluster shots.
teamups.enhanced: When teaming up with Peni Parker, Spider-Tracers applied by Web-Cluster are upgraded. Detonating these upgraded marks generates <Buff>Bonus Health for Spider-Man.

received.name: Inferno Blast
received.desc: Human Torch stores Pyrokinetic Energy in Spider-Man's suit, enabling him to unleash an Inferno Blast that sprays a fiery web while performing a backflip to create distance. The flames damage enemies and apply a Burn-Tracer. Detonating these Burn-Tracers inflicts Damage Over Time

received.name: Sticky Spider-Bomb
received.desc: Cyber-Spiders Peni Parker whips up a Sticky Bomb for Spider-Man! Prime it, then toss it before the timer's up for a blast that damages nearby enemies and attaches a Spider-Tracer to them. If not thrown in time, it explodes on Spider-Man, recharging a Web-Cluster shot and granting Bonus Health

heroes.name: SQUIRREL GIRL
heroes.desc: Possessing only the powers of a common squirrel, somehow Doreen Green manages to defeat seemingly invincible enemies in the most unexpected ways. Any foe who counts her out is bound to fall at the hands of the Unbeatable Squirrel Girl!

abilities.name: Burst Acorn
abilities.desc: Shoot bouncing Burst Acorns

abilities.name: Unbeatable Squirrel Tsunami
abilities.desc: Summon a horde of squirrels to charge forward, dealing damage while bouncing against structures

abilities.name: Tail Bounce
abilities.desc: Rocket upwards with a bounce of her tail

abilities.name: Mammal Bond
abilities.desc: Reload Burst Acorns and can use an ability without cooldown once in a short duration

abilities.name: Squirrel Blockade
abilities.desc: Launch an acorn to unleash Squirrel Guards, Imprisoning the first hit enemy

teamups.name: SQUIRREL MISSILE
teamups.base: Squirrel Girl gains the Squirrel Missile ability. She directs a squirrel to ride Iron Man's nanotech glove as a homing missile. Upon hit, the squirrel flees just before a fiery explosion.
teamups.enhanced: When teaming up with Iron Man, using Squirrel Blockade simultaneously fires a Squirrel Missile.

teamups.name: ESU ALUMNUS
teamups.base: Spider-Man gives Squirrel Girl a web bomb. She can launch it to unleash an explosion upon contact with the environment or an enemy, briefly Slowing and damaging enemies caught in the blast.
teamups.enhanced: When teaming up with Spider-Man, Squirrel Girl receives more Web Fluid. After throwing Webbed Acorn, viscous web fluid coats the ground alongside the explosion, leaving behind a sticky Web Area. Enemies within suffer a continuous Slow that scales into a Stun if they linger too long.

received.name: Squirrel Missile
received.desc: When Iron Man, Ultron and Squirrel Girl team up, Ultron's Encephalo-Ray upgrades to Nano-Ray, firing a beam that pierces through all characters, dealing continuous damage to foes while healing allies; Squirrel Girl gains the Squirrel Missile ability. She directs a squirrel to ride Iron Man's nanotech glove as a homing missile. Upon hit, the squirrel flees just before a fiery explosion!

heroes.name: STAR-LORD
heroes.desc: Peter Quill lives to dazzle his foes on the battlefield with his signature swagger. As his element guns paint arcs of devastation, his acrobatic moves sail through the sky with unrivaled style. With performances this spectacular, it's no wonder that Star-Lord is so legendary!

abilities.name: Element Guns
abilities.desc: Shoot enemies with dual Element Guns

abilities.name: Galactic Legend
abilities.desc: Engage in free-flight and lock onto enemies in sight

abilities.name: Rocket Propulsion
abilities.desc: Consume energy to gain a Movement Boost and soar forward

abilities.name: Blaster Barrage
abilities.desc: Fire a frenzy of shots, causing damage to enemies within range.

abilities.name: Stellar Shift
abilities.desc: Dodge in the direction of movement and swiftly reload

teamups.name: FLORA MUNITIONS
teamups.base: Gain a new ability to toss Twisted Thorn Seeds forward. Upon landing, they rapidly Sprout and take root, generating Thorn Snares around the area. Enemies stepping on a snare take damage and suffer a Root effect.
teamups.enhanced: When teaming up with Groot, the number of Thorn Snares deployed increases, and the damage dealt when an enemy steps on them is boosted.

teamups.name: STAR-SOUL
teamups.base: Gain a new ability to place a Telekinetic Beacon. You can teleport back to the location where the beacon is deployed from anywhere on the map. Upon defeat, Star-Lord will cocoon and respawn at the Telekinetic Beacon's coordinates.
teamups.enhanced: When teaming up with Adam Warlock, every time Star-Lord participates in a KO, Telekinetic Beaconcooldown is reduced.

received.name: Astral Jump
received.desc: Star-Lord gets a teleport to its deployment point from anywhere on the map

heroes.name: STORM
heroes.desc: An Omega-level Mutant ability to manipulate weather patterns makes Ororo Munroe a force to be reckoned with. Rain or shine, thunder or lightning, nature itself bends to the command of the Goddess of the Storm!

abilities.name: Wind Blade
abilities.desc: Launch forward-piercing Wind Blades

abilities.name: Omega Hurricane
abilities.desc: Transform into a hurricane to draw in nearby enemies and deal damage

abilities.name: Weather Control
abilities.desc: Switch the weather to empower allies: Tornado grants a Movement Boost; Thunder grants a Damage Boost

abilities.name: Goddess Boost
abilities.desc: Channel the power of the weather to empower Storm: Tornado grants a Movement Boost and inflicts Slow on enemies; Thunder grants a Damage Boost and summons lightning to inflict damage

abilities.name: Bolt Rush
abilities.desc: Unleash a lightning bolt forward

teamups.name: GOD OF THUNDER
teamups.base: Upgrade Wind Blade into a hitscan beam that detonates upon striking a target.
teamups.enhanced: When teaming up with Thor, Bolt Rush becomes Chain Lightning, allowing it to bounce from foe to foe

teamups.name: JAWS OF FATE
teamups.base: Unleash a torrential downpour that continuously heals both herself and her teammates.
teamups.enhanced: When teaming up with Jeff the Land Shark, casting Omega Hurricane allows Jeff to swim inside the cyclone, generating a localized Jeff-nado.

received.name: ETERNAL WEATHER WITCH
received.desc: Storm channels her elemental power into Adam Warlock. When Adam uses Soaring Surge, his movement speed is increased. While flying, Adam leaves behind a storm-charged trail that heals and speeds up allies within it

heroes.name: THE PUNISHER
heroes.desc: Expertly wielding a full arsenal of futuristic weapons, Frank Castle is a formidable one-man army. With a steadfast resolve to deliver justice to his enemies, The Punisher won't cease in his mission until every last round is fired!

abilities.name: Adjudication
abilities.desc: Fire at enemies with Adjudication, his Automatic Rifle

abilities.name: Deliverance
abilities.desc: Fire at enemies with Deliverance, his Shotgun

abilities.name: Final Judgement
abilities.desc: Unleash two Gatling guns and missiles to attack enemies

abilities.name: Vantage Connection
abilities.desc: Launch a hook to generate a cable that enables the Punisher to move rapidly by pressing F

abilities.name: Culling Turret
abilities.desc: Deploy a Culling Turret that grounds Punisher and blocks damage from the front while dealing massive damage

abilities.name: Scourge Grenade
abilities.desc: Throw a smoke grenade forward to obscure enemy vision and leap backward

abilities.name: Warrior's Gaze
abilities.desc: Retain vision of enemies that disappear from view for a short duration

teamups.name: BESTIAL HUNT
teamups.base: Shoot piercing bullets that carry a Damage Boost effect.
teamups.enhanced: When teaming up with Daredevil, the bullets break enemy summoned walls and shields more quickly.

teamups.name: AMMO OVERLOAD
teamups.base: Throw an Ammo Overload Device in the target direction. Upon entering the device's range, receive Faster Firing.
teamups.enhanced: When teaming up with Rocket Raccoon, the device grants Infinite Ammo.

received.name: CUTTING-EDGE TECH
received.desc: The Punisher upgrades Black Widow's arsenal, adding a Pulse Mode to her Red Room Rifle. While the ability is active, using Straight Shooter fires a pulse beam that deals piercing damage

received.name: JUSTICE SENSE
received.desc: Daredevil shares the location of his Sonic Pursuit target with The Punisher. At the same time, The Punisher can launch a devil-infused shock grenade to damage and blind enemies

received.name: Ancient Judgement
received.desc: The Punisher rides atop Devil Dinosaur, restricting him to only Adjudication/Deliverance and Scourge Grenade while disabling other abilities. While mounted, Devil Dinosaur absorbs a portion of all damage inflicted on The Punisher

heroes.name: THE THING
heroes.desc: Benjamin J. Grimm is unquestionably the rock star of any team he's on. Always at the forefront of the fight, the Thing shields his allies with his unbreakable form, selflessly fending off any harm that comes their way.

abilities.name: Rocky Jab
abilities.desc: Rapidly punch forward

abilities.name: Stone Haymaker
abilities.desc: Deliver a devastating Heavy Blow. Can Knock Down flying enemies.
abilities.dmg: 55+10% of enemies' max Health per hit

abilities.name: Yancy Street Charge
abilities.desc: Continuously charge forward, launching up enemies and leaving behind a zone at the final position that prevents the use of mobility abilities
abilities.dmg: Charge: 30; ground slam: 20; immobilization zone: 15 per/s

abilities.name: Embattled Leap
abilities.desc: Jump toward an ally and apply damage reduction to yourself and allies within the landing area
abilities.cd_text: Basic Cooldown 3s, with a charge of 10s per use

abilities.name: Battle Blitz
abilities.desc: Jump toward an enemy and apply Vulnerability to enemies within the landing area

abilities.name: Clobberin' Time
abilities.desc: Use immense power to launch up all enemies in front of the Thing into the air

abilities.name: Unyielding Will
abilities.desc: Immune to launch-up, knock-back, and other displacement effects

teamups.name: TWO IN ONE
teamups.base: Enter an enhanced state upon activation. For the duration, The Thing's fists are violently engulfed in flames. Every Rocky Jab deals splash damage, and every Stone Haymaker creates an explosion, dealing damage in a frontal cone.
teamups.enhanced: When teaming up with Human Torch, Human Torch can lift The Thing into the air and slam him down, dealing damage and Stun to enemies. The Thing then automatically enters his flaming enhanced state upon landing.

teamups.name: UNBREAKABLE FORCES
teamups.base: Generate a layer of Psionic Armor upon activation, granting Bonus Health scaling off currently missing Health.
teamups.enhanced: When teaming up Invisible Woman, the Psionic Armor is fortified. While active, every time The Thing takes a set amount of damage, the armor pulses out a wave of area healing for allies. Furthermore, the conversion ratio for missing Health into Bonus Health is increased.

received.name: Cosmic Fastball
received.desc: Wolverine and The Thing can interact with each other. Once both parties confirm, The Thing can lift Wolverine and press the key to hurl him forward

received.name: GAMMA CHARGE
received.desc: Hulk charges Black Panther and The Thing with gamma radiation. When Black Panther's health is low, he gains a gamma shield, becoming Unstoppable and blocking attacks. The Thing gains Gamma Gauntlets, boosting Damage and range of his Rocky Jab and Stone Haymaker. Dealing damage with these attacks grants Bonus Health, and maximum Bonus Health cap is increased

received.name: Flying Thing
received.desc: Human Torch can lift The Thing into the air and slam him down, dealing damage, launching enemies, and creating a zone that disables mobility abilities

heroes.name: THOR
heroes.desc: The son of Odin taps into his divine power to call forth thunder and lightning, raining down relentless fury upon his enemies. With his mighty hammer Mjolnir in hand, Thor effortlessly asserts his dominance on the field of combat.

abilities.name: Mjolnir Bash
abilities.desc: Wield Mjolnir to strike enemies. When Awakened, Thor can launch lightning arc waves to deal damage

abilities.name: God of Thunder
abilities.desc: Soar upwards and smite the ground after charging for a duration, inflicting damage on enemies within range
abilities.dmg: The sustained spell field lasts for 0.5s, dealing 40 damage, while the one-time spell field deals 220 damage

abilities.name: Storm Surge
abilities.desc: Hold to spin Mjolnir before dashing forward and knocking back enemies
abilities.dmg: No Charge Damage: 40; Full Charge Damage: 60

abilities.name: Lightning Realm
abilities.desc: Summon lightning that restores Thorforce based on the number of hit enemies
abilities.dmg: Deal 40 damage when enemies cross the boundaries

abilities.name: Awakening Rune
abilities.desc: Consume Thorforce to enter the Awakened state, granting Bonus Health and enhancing Mjolnir Bash
abilities.dmg: Projectile Damage: 70, Spell Field Damage: 15 per second

abilities.name: Hammer Throw
abilities.desc: Throw Mjolnir forward which then returns
abilities.dmg: Outward Projectile Damage: 50; Returning Projectile Damage: 25

abilities.name: Thorforce
abilities.desc: Consume Thorforce to gain Bonus Health. Landing Mjolnir Bash on an enemy instantly recharges Thorforce

teamups.name: RAGNAROK REBIRTH
teamups.base: Receiving fatal damage prevents immediate defeat, Thor gains a decaying pool of Bonus Health. If he participates in a KO during this time, he resurrects and recovers a small amount of Health.
teamups.enhanced: When teaming up with Hela, if either of them participates in a KO, Thor instantly revives, restoring Health equal to his remaining Bonus Health and gaining a Continuous Healing effect.

teamups.name: DIVINE ARMORY
teamups.base: Hurl a Thunder Spear that restores Thorforce for each enemy struck. Afterward, Thor canleap to the spear's explosion point, dealing a second wave of damage to all enemies within range.
teamups.enhanced: When teaming up with Angela, leaping to the Thunder Spear grants Bonus Health.

received.name: THUNDERSTRIKE PIKE
received.desc: Angela shares fragments of her Ichors with Thor, empowering him to hurl a Thunder Spear that restores Thorforce for each enemy struck. Afterward, Thor can leap to the spear's explosion point, dealing a second wave of damage to all enemies within range

heroes.name: ULTRON
heroes.desc: The Pinnacle of artificial lifeforms, Ultron is programmed to learn and adapt in ways beyond human capability. He can summon an army of automated drones that obey his every command, arising his chances of victory exponentially.

abilities.name: ENCEPHALO-RAY
abilities.desc: Unleash a burning energy beam
abilities.dmg: First beam 6 rounds in 0.5s, 12 per hit; second single-cast spell field 75 per hit

abilities.name: IMPERATIVE: FIREWALL
abilities.desc: Deploy drones to an ally marked by Imperative: Patch, granting them increased Speed and Damage. Additionally, all allies within range of you and the chosen teammate receive Bonus Health.

abilities.name: IMPERATIVE: PATCH
abilities.desc: Command up to 2 giant drones to follow 2 allies, constantly healing allies within its radius, with more healing for the designated allies.

abilities.name: DYNAMIC FLIGHT
abilities.desc: Fly quickly in the direction of movement and then enter an Accelerated state

abilities.name: RAGE OF ULTRON
abilities.desc: Summon Ultron Drones to fire Encephalo-Rays, damaging enemies or healing allies

teamups.name: STARK PROTOCOL
teamups.base: Upgrade Encephalo-Ray to Nano-Ray, firing multiple damaging nano-projectiles forward.
teamups.enhanced: When teaming up with Iron Man, Imperative: Firewall fires powerful homing missiles at enemies in range, causing area damage.

teamups.name: SP//DR SYNC
teamups.base: Apply Imperative: Patch to all allies.
teamups.enhanced: When teaming up with Peni Parker, Imperative: Firewall applies to all Drones, allowing the ability effects to be triggered multiple times simultaneously.

received.name: NANO RAY
received.desc: When Iron Man, Ultron and Squirrel Girl team up, Ultron's Encephalo-Ray upgrades to Nano-Ray, firing a beam that pierces through all characters, dealing continuous damage to foes while healing allies; Squirrel Girl gains the Squirrel Missile ability. She directs a squirrel to ride Iron Man's nanotech glove as a homing missile. Upon hit, the squirrel flees just before a fiery explosion!

heroes.name: VENOM
heroes.desc: Using his symbiote-enhanced body as the perfect living weapon, Eddie Brock and his alien ally stand ever-ready to unleash vicious attacks upon anyone he deems an enemy. Those ensnared by Venom's tentacles have no choice but to surrender to this insatiable predator.

abilities.name: Dark Predation
abilities.desc: Unleash tentacles forward to attack enemies

abilities.name: Feast of the Abyss
abilities.desc: Burrow underground for free movement. After a duration or by left-clicking, devour enemies above to deal damage based on the enemy's current health and generate equivalent Bonus Health. Devoured enemies suffer Reduced Healing
abilities.dmg: Inflict damage equal to 50% of the target's health, followed by an additional 50 damage

abilities.name: Venom Swing
abilities.desc: Launch webbing forward, allowing for a singular swing in the desired direction

abilities.name: Symbiotic Resilience
abilities.desc: Generate Bonus Health against damage. The lower Venom's Health, the greater the Bonus Health generated

abilities.name: Frenzied Arrival
abilities.desc: Dash to the target location from a certain height. Upon landing, damage nearby enemies, launching them up toward the landing point
abilities.dmg: 65 damage, with damage falloff starting at 2m from the center of the spell field and decreasing to 40% at 6m

abilities.name: Cellular Corrosion
abilities.desc: Unleash tentacles to Slow enemies within reach. Enemies unable to break free in time will suffer damage
abilities.dmg: The spell field deals 5 damage, increasing to 80 damage if the target remains in the area for a duration

abilities.name: Alien Biology
abilities.desc: Press Space to wall crawl, and while crawling, left-click to sprint

teamups.name: BLOOD LEECH
teamups.base: Cellular Corrosion new effect: while tethered to enemies, continuously siphon health from every linked target, restoring Venom's Health.
teamups.enhanced: When teaming up with Blade, Venom gains a burst of one-time healing when using certain specific abilities.

teamups.name: ABYSSAL FLAMES
teamups.base: Ignites the symbiote with Phoenix Flames for a duration, replacing Dark Predation with a sweeping Phoenix Touch frontal slash.
teamups.enhanced: When teaming up with Phoenix, Venom's Phoenix Force is enhanced: every Phoenix Touch applies Sparks. Upon reaching three stacks, the Sparks detonate.

received.name: HEALING TENDRILS
received.desc: Venom shares his symbiotes with Jeff and Hela. Jeff's Guardian of the Deep links with nearby allies, providing continuous healing. When the effect ends, it releases a powerful healing burst, converting any excess into Bonus Health. Hela's Hel Tendrils unleash a symbiotic Hel Sphere. Upon hit, it pulls nearby enemies toward the impact point and links them, slowing enemies that try to escape.

heroes.name: WHITE FOX
heroes.desc: Ami Han, the last of the legendary Kumiho, can summon her ancestral Nine-Tailed Power to fortify herself and heal her allies on the battlefield. As the calm and capable Director of Tiger Division, she is any team's unwavering backbone, no matter the foe.

abilities.name: YEOWOO GUSEUL
abilities.desc: Fire a Fox Marble forward that bounces off terrain or heroes, then homes in on nearby heroes. It damages enemies, heals allies, and restores Spirit Tail energy
abilities.dmg: Direct hit: 40 per round; bounce hit: 25 per round
abilities.heal: Direct hit: 50 per round; bounce hit: 35 per round

abilities.name: CLAW STRIKE
abilities.desc: While Awakened, slash forward with a flurry of attacks

abilities.name: SPECTRAL SURGE
abilities.desc: Consume one Spirit Tail to send a spectral fox forward. It heals and grants invulnerability to allies it passes through, damages and Charms enemies, forcing foes to move toward White Fox

abilities.name: FOX FORM AWAKENING
abilities.desc: Enter Awakened state, transforming Spirit Tails into physical tails. While active, continuously drain Spirit Tail energy and heal nearby allies. Striking enemies provides additional area healing

abilities.name: SPIRIT SANCTUARY
abilities.desc: Teleport to a chosen ally, instantly healing allies in the area while generating a shield

abilities.name: TAIL SWEEP
abilities.desc: While Awakened, sweep forward tails to launch up hit enemies

abilities.name: Predatory Pounce
abilities.desc: While Awakened, dash forward. Hit an enemy to slow them, enabling a second dash that knocks back enemies

abilities.name: KUMIHO UNLEASHED
abilities.desc: Manifest the full Nine-Tailed Fox form and continuously heal nearby allies. Cannot receive healing effects from others while in this form

abilities.name: NINEFOLD SLAM
abilities.desc: In Kumiho Form, slam the ground, causing an explosive shockwave. Hitting enemies or summons grants One-Time Healing to self and nearby allies

abilities.name: BLESSED BY THE NINE
abilities.desc: In Kumiho Form, select an ally to grant Continuous Healing, Unstoppable, and Life-Steal for a short time

teamups.name: LUCKY LOAN
teamups.base: White Fox receives an Orb of Life from Black Cat. Upon use, it recovers Spirit Tail energy and converts life energy into Nine-Tailed Aura that shoots out in all directions. This automatically tracks nearby allies and enemies, granting Speed and Healing to allies while damaging and Slowing enemies. nhanced Effect: When teaming up with Black Cat, using the Orb triggers a state where Spirit Tail Energy is no longer consumed for a duration, allowing free use of Spectral Surge and Fox Form Awakening.

teamups.name: PSIONIC FOX
teamups.base: Activating Fox Form Awakening no longer consumes Spirit Tail energy, and grants the maximum possible duration immediately upon use.
teamups.enhanced: When teaming up with Psylocke, the cooldown for Fox Form Awakening is drastically reduced.

received.name: SPIRIT FOX WARD
received.desc: White Fox grants Luna Snow a spirit fox for protection. Luna can activate it for a burst of speed and fire it forward, healing allies in its path while applying Charm to enemies

received.name: NINE-TAILED AURA
received.desc: Black Cat shares her luck with her allies. When White Fox embraces her newfound fortune, she unleashestracking Spirit Tails to grant Healing and Speed to allies, while damaging and Slowing foes. When Captain America enjoys his luck, his shield's block radius expands and allows him to aim deflectedProjectiles directly toward his target

heroes.name: WINTER SOLDIER
heroes.desc: Terrifying experiments turned him into a brainwashed assassin, but now James Buchanan "Bucky" Barnes is in control of his own fate once again. With his enhanced mechanical arm, the Winter Soldier is primed to deliver earth-shattering blows to any foe in his path!

abilities.name: Roterstern
abilities.desc: Fire explosive rounds with his blaster, Roterstern, damaging the target hit and enemies behind them.

abilities.name: Kraken Impact
abilities.desc: Leap high, then dash forward and slam down with the bionic arm, dealing damage to enemies in range, marking them for Culling. Marked enemies will perish instantly if their health falls below a certain threshold, recharging the bionic arm for another Kraken Impact within a short period

abilities.name: Trooper's Fist
abilities.desc: Dash forward, seizing enemies along the path and launching up enemies at the end of the dash

abilities.name: Tainted Voltage
abilities.desc: Charge up and launch a powerful electrical punch with the bionic arm in the target direction, dealing damage to enemies within range and Slowing them. This ability can Knock Down flying heroes

abilities.name: Bionic Hook
abilities.desc: Charge up and launch a hook with his bionic arm, reeling in the first target hit and enemies lurking behind

abilities.name: Ceaseless Charge
abilities.desc: Roterstern reloads automatically while the bionic arm is in action, granting Bonus Health to the Winter Soldier

teamups.name: TIMELESS VETERANS
teamups.base: Unlocks the Burst Spike ability. Using the bionic arm emits forward electricity, dealing damage and Knocking Back enemies.
teamups.enhanced: When teaming up with The Punisher, the electric burst applies a Grounded effect and Knocks Back enemies even further.

teamups.name: EXPERT INSTINCT
teamups.base: Securing or participating in a KO grants a stack of Culling Instinct. Each stack reduces the cooldowns of Winter Soldier's other abilities. All stacks are lost upon defeat.
teamups.enhanced: When teaming up with Elsa Bloodstone, the Bonus Health generated by Ceaseless Charge is increased.

received.name: Stellar Impact
received.desc: Inspired by Captain America's resolve, Winter Soldier can leap to the aid of a designated ally, slamming the ground with his mechanical arm to damage nearby foes and grant Bonus Health to allies within range. Captain America and Winter Soldier can interact with each other once both parties confirm. The duo then collides and unleashes a shockwave that damages and slows enemies

heroes.name: WOLVERINE
heroes.desc: Thanks to his regenerative healing factor and berserker rage, the centuries-old Logan can fight through the worst pain to go claw-to-claw with any foe. The Wolverine stands ready to shred through all obstacles in his way with his Adamantium claws.

abilities.name: Savage Claw
abilities.desc: Slash with Adamantium claws for a Claw Strike. Unleashing Feral Leap will enhance it to Berserk Claw Strike for a brief period

abilities.name: Last Stand
abilities.desc: Knock enemies ahead airborne and spiral through the air, sweeping up enemies along the path and delivering a devastating impact at the landing point

abilities.name: Feral Leap
abilities.desc: Leap like an animal to snatch the first enemy upon impact and Smash them to the ground. Unleashing this ability will enhance his normal attack to Berserk Claw Strike for a brief period

abilities.name: Undying Animal
abilities.desc: Unleash a fierce howl to briefly reduce incoming damage

abilities.name: Vicious Rampage
abilities.desc: Dash forward and unleash a Claw Strike

abilities.name: Regenerative Healing Factor
abilities.desc: Begin to heal and rise with a hefty Bonus Health, shaking off all debuffs. After a brief moment, any remaining Bonus Health morphs into a one-off heal, zeroing out his Rage. Assists in KOs reduce this cooldown

abilities.name: Berserker Rage
abilities.desc: Rage builds when Wolverine attacks or takes hits, boosting the damage of his Claw Strikes and the Bonus Health from his regenerative healing factor

teamups.name: BLAST SLASH
teamups.base: Activation extends the attack range of Savage Claw and Berserk Claw Strike. Vicious Rampage is replaced with Kinetic Claws, granting a brief forward lunge that unleashes a flurry of slashes around.
teamups.enhanced: When teaming up with Cyclops, Blast Slash is permanently active.
teamups.dmg: 5 + 0.01% of Max Health as damage per Rage point

teamups.name: PAIR OF THREES
teamups.base: Upon activation, Wolverine receives Kinetic Enhancement, gaining increased Movement Speed and a Jump Boost. Attacking enemies applies Kinetic Particles that detonate after a short delay for bonus damage. The effect lasts for duration.
teamups.enhanced: When teaming up with Gambit, Wolverine receives Continuous Healing for the entire duration of the ability.

received.name: Phoenix Warrior
received.desc: Wolverine and Hulk can interact with each other. Once both parties confirm, Hulk can lift Wolverine and press the key to hurl him forwardJean Grey imbues Wolverine with the awe-inspiring Phoenix Force. With this power, Wolverine's Feral Leap transforms into Phoenix Warrior. While active, he is enveloped in Phoenix flames that continuously scorch him and nearby enemies, dealing Percentage Damage. In this state, Wolverine's abilities gain Lifesteal when inflicting damage

received.name: Kinetic Claws
received.desc: Cyclops supercharges Wolverine's claws, extending his attack range. While active, Wolverine's Vicious Rampage is replaced with Kinetic Claws, granting him a brief forward lunge that unleashes a flurry of slashes around him
